authors_text: Sara Mousavi,Zhenning Yang,Kelley Cross,Dawnie Steadman,Audris Mockus
title: SLRNet: Semi-Supervised Semantic Segmentation Via Label Reuse for Human Decomposition Images
title_zh: SLRNet：通过人体分解图像的标签重用进行半监督语义分割
abstract: Semantic segmentation is a challenging computer vision task demanding a significant amount of pixel-level annotated data. Producing such data is a time-consuming and costly process, especially for domains with a scarcity of experts, such as medicine or forensic anthropology. While numerous semi-supervised approaches have been developed to make the most from the limited labeled data and ample amount of unlabeled data, domain-specific real-world datasets often have characteristics that both reduce the effectiveness of off-the-shelf state-of-the-art methods and also provide opportunities to create new methods that exploit these characteristics. We propose and evaluate a semi-supervised method that reuses available labels for unlabeled images of a dataset by exploiting existing similarities, while dynamically weighting the impact of these reused labels in the training process. We evaluate our method on a large dataset of human decomposition images and find that our method, while conceptually simple, outperforms state-of-the-art consistency and pseudo-labeling-based methods for the segmentation of this dataset. This paper includes graphic content of human decomposition.
summary: Semantic segmentation is a challenging computer vision task demanding a significant amount of pixel-level annotated data. Producing such data is a time-consuming and costly process, especially for domains with a scarcity of experts, such as medicine or forensic anthropology. While numerous semi-supervised approaches have been developed to make the most from the limited labeled data and ample amount of unlabeled data, domain-specific real-world datasets often have characteristics that both reduce the effectiveness of off-the-shelf state-of-the-art methods and also provide opportunities to create new methods that exploit these characteristics. We propose and evaluate a semi-supervised method that reuses available labels for unlabeled images of a dataset by exploiting existing similarities, while dynamically weighting the impact of these reused labels in the training process. We evaluate our method on a large dataset of human decomposition images and find that our method, while conceptually simple, outperforms state-of-the-art consistency and pseudo-labeling-based methods for the segmentation of this dataset. This paper includes graphic content of human decomposition.
abstract_zh: 语义分割是一项具有挑战性的计算机视觉任务，需要大量的像素级注释数据。生成此类数据是一个耗时且成本高昂的过程，特别是对于缺乏专家的领域，例如医学或法医人类学。虽然已经开发了许多半监督方法来充分利用有限的标记数据和大量未标记数据，但特定领域的现实世界数据集通常具有一些特征，这些特征既会降低现成的最先进方法的有效性，又提供了创建利用这些特征的新方法的机会。我们提出并评估了一种半监督方法，该方法通过利用现有的相似性，重用数据集未标记图像的可用标签，同时在训练过程中动态加权这些重用标签的影响。我们在人体分解图像的大型数据集上评估我们的方法，发现我们的方法虽然概念上很简单，但在该数据集的分割方面优于最先进的一致性和基于伪标签的方法。本文包含人体分解图解内容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SLRNet方法，通过标签复用实现半监督语义分割，用于人类分解图像的人体分解任务。
AI.motivation: 语义分割需要大量像素级标注数据，而医学或法医领域专家稀缺导致数据获取成本高。现有方法在特定领域数据集上效果不佳，需针对性改进。
AI.method: 利用已标注数据与未标注数据的相似性复用标签，并在训练过程中动态调整复用标签的权重，实现半监督学习。
AI.result: 在大规模人类分解图像数据集上，该方法在分割任务中优于基于一致性约束和伪标签的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简单机制有效利用领域特定数据特性，为类似数据集的分割任务提供了可行解决方案。

title: Improving Robustness of Convolutional Neural Networks Using Element-Wise Activation Scaling
title_zh: 使用逐元素激活缩放提高卷积神经网络的鲁棒性
abstract: Recent works reveal that re-calibrating the intermediate activation of adversarial examples can improve the adversarial robustness of a CNN model. The state of the arts [Baiet al., 2021] and [Yanet al., 2021] explores this feature at the channel level, i.e. the activation of a channel is uniformly scaled by a factor. In this paper, we investigate the intermediate activation manipulation at a more fine-grained level. Instead of uniformly scaling the activation, we individually adjust each element within an activation and thus propose Element-Wise Activation Scaling, dubbed EWAS, to improve CNNs' adversarial robustness. Experimental results on ResNet-18 and WideResNet with CIFAR10 and SVHN show that EWAS significantly improves the robustness accuracy. Especially for ResNet18 on CIFAR10, EWAS increases the adversarial accuracy by 37.65% to 82.35% against C&W attack. EWAS is simple yet very effective in terms of improving robustness. The codes are anonymously available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EWAS-DD64.
summary: Recent works reveal that re-calibrating the intermediate activation of adversarial examples can improve the adversarial robustness of a CNN model. The state of the arts [Baiet al., 2021] and [Yanet al., 2021] explores this feature at the channel level, i.e. the activation of a channel is uniformly scaled by a factor. In this paper, we investigate the intermediate activation manipulation at a more fine-grained level. Instead of uniformly scaling the activation, we individually adjust each element within an activation and thus propose Element-Wise Activation Scaling, dubbed EWAS, to improve CNNs' adversarial robustness. Experimental results on ResNet-18 and WideResNet with CIFAR10 and SVHN show that EWAS significantly improves the robustness accuracy. Especially for ResNet18 on CIFAR10, EWAS increases the adversarial accuracy by 37.65% to 82.35% against C&W attack. EWAS is simple yet very effective in terms of improving robustness. The codes are anonymously available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EWAS-DD64.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，重新校准对抗样本的中间激活可以提高 CNN 模型的对抗鲁棒性。最先进的技术 [Baiet al., 2021] 和 [Yanet al., 2021] 在通道级别探索了这一特征，即通道的激活按一个因子均匀缩放。在本文中，我们在更细粒度的水平上研究了中间激活操作。我们不是统一缩放激活，而是单独调整激活中的每个元素，从而提出逐元素激活缩放（称为 EWAS），以提高 CNN 的对抗鲁棒性。在带有 CIFAR10 和 SVHN 的 ResNet-18 和 WideResNet 上的实验结果表明，EWAS 显着提高了鲁棒性精度。特别是对于 CIFAR10 上的 ResNet18，EWAS 针对 C&W 攻击的对抗精度提高了 37.65% 至 82.35%。 EWAS 很简单，但在提高鲁棒性方面非常有效。这些代码可在 https://anonymous.4open.science/r/EWAS-DD64 上匿名获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为EWAS的元素级激活缩放方法，以提升卷积神经网络（CNN）在对抗样本下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在通道级别对激活值进行统一缩放以提升对抗鲁棒性，但未考虑更细粒度的调整。本文旨在通过单独调整每个激活元素来进一步提高鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出元素级激活缩放（EWAS），对每个激活值独立调整而非通道级统一缩放，以更精细地校准中间激活特征。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10和SVHN数据集上，EWAS显著提升了ResNet-18和WideResNet的对抗准确率，例如ResNet18在CIFAR10上对抗C&W攻击的准确率从37.65%提升至82.35%。
AI.conclusion: EWAS是一种简单有效的提升CNN对抗鲁棒性的方法，实验结果验证了其优越性，代码已开源。

title: Controlling Memorability of Face Images
title_zh: 控制人脸图像的可记忆性
abstract: Everyday, we are bombarded with many photographs of faces, whether on social media, television, or smartphones. From an evolutionary perspective, faces are intended to be remembered, mainly due to survival and personal relevance. However, all these faces do not have the equal opportunity to stick in our minds. It has been shown that memorability is an intrinsic feature of an image but yet, it is largely unknown what attributes make an image more memorable. In this work, we aimed to address this question by proposing a fast approach to modify and control the memorability of face images. In our proposed method, we first found a hyperplane in the latent space of StyleGAN to separate high and low memorable images. We then modified the image memorability (while maintaining the identity and other facial features such as age, emotion, etc.) by moving in the positive or negative direction of this hyperplane normal vector. We further analyzed how different layers of the StyleGAN augmented latent space contribute to face memorability. These analyses showed how each individual face attribute makes an image more or less memorable. Most importantly, we evaluated our proposed method for both real and synthesized face images. The proposed method successfully modifies and controls the memorability of real human faces as well as unreal synthesized faces. Our proposed method can be employed in photograph editing applications for social media, learning aids, or advertisement purposes.
summary: Everyday, we are bombarded with many photographs of faces, whether on social media, television, or smartphones. From an evolutionary perspective, faces are intended to be remembered, mainly due to survival and personal relevance. However, all these faces do not have the equal opportunity to stick in our minds. It has been shown that memorability is an intrinsic feature of an image but yet, it is largely unknown what attributes make an image more memorable. In this work, we aimed to address this question by proposing a fast approach to modify and control the memorability of face images. In our proposed method, we first found a hyperplane in the latent space of StyleGAN to separate high and low memorable images. We then modified the image memorability (while maintaining the identity and other facial features such as age, emotion, etc.) by moving in the positive or negative direction of this hyperplane normal vector. We further analyzed how different layers of the StyleGAN augmented latent space contribute to face memorability. These analyses showed how each individual face attribute makes an image more or less memorable. Most importantly, we evaluated our proposed method for both real and synthesized face images. The proposed method successfully modifies and controls the memorability of real human faces as well as unreal synthesized faces. Our proposed method can be employed in photograph editing applications for social media, learning aids, or advertisement purposes.
abstract_zh: 每天，我们都会受到许多面孔照片的轰炸，无论是在社交媒体、电视还是智能手机上。从进化的角度来看，面孔是为了被记住，主要是出于生存和个人相关性。然而，所有这些面孔并没有平等的机会留在我们的脑海中。研究表明，可记忆性是图像的固有特征，但目前尚不清楚哪些属性使图像更容易记住。在这项工作中，我们旨在通过提出一种快速方法来修改和控制面部图像的可记忆性来解决这个问题。在我们提出的方法中，我们首先在 StyleGAN 的潜在空间中找到一个超平面来分离高记忆图像和低记忆图像。然后，我们通过沿该超平面法向量的正向或负向移动来修改图像的可记忆性（同时保持身份和其他面部特征，例如年龄、情感等）。我们进一步分析了 StyleGAN 增强潜在空间的不同层如何有助于面部记忆。这些分析显示了每个人脸属性如何使图像或多或少令人难忘。最重要的是，我们针对真实和合成的面部图像评估了我们提出的方法。该方法成功地修改和控制了真实人脸以及非真实合成人脸的可记忆性。我们提出的方法可用于社交媒体、学习辅助或广告目的的照片编辑应用程序。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过修改StyleGAN潜在空间中的超平面来控制人脸图像可记忆性的方法。
AI.motivation: 人脸图像的可记忆性受多种属性影响但机制不明，需开发方法以控制其可记忆性，应用于社交媒体、教育辅助等领域。
AI.method: 在StyleGAN潜在空间中寻找区分高/低可记忆图像的超平面，沿超平面法线方向调整图像以改变可记忆性，分析各层潜在空间对可记忆性的贡献。
AI.result: 方法成功修改了真实人脸和合成图像的可记忆性，同时保持身份、年龄、情绪等属性不变。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为控制图像可记忆性提供有效工具，并揭示了不同面部属性对可记忆性的影响机制。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种通过修改StyleGAN潜在空间中的超平面来控制人脸图像可记忆性的方法。
ai_content.motivation: 人脸图像的可记忆性受多种属性影响但机制不明，需开发方法以控制其可记忆性，应用于社交媒体、教育辅助等领域。
ai_content.method: 在StyleGAN潜在空间中寻找区分高/低可记忆图像的超平面，沿超平面法线方向调整图像以改变可记忆性，分析各层潜在空间对可记忆性的贡献。
ai_content.result: 方法成功修改了真实人脸和合成图像的可记忆性，同时保持身份、年龄、情绪等属性不变。
ai_content.conclusion: 该方法为控制图像可记忆性提供有效工具，并揭示了不同面部属性对可记忆性的影响机制。

search_text: Controlling Memorability of Face Images 控制人脸图像的可记忆性 Everyday, we are bombarded with many photographs of faces, whether on social media, television, or smartphones. From an evolutionary perspective, faces are intended to be remembered, mainly due to survival and personal relevance. However, all these faces do not have the equal opportunity to stick in our minds. It has been shown that memorability is an intrinsic feature of an image but yet, it is largely unknown what attributes make an image more memorable. In this work, we aimed to address this question by proposing a fast approach to modify and control the memorability of face images. In our proposed method, we first found a hyperplane in the latent space of StyleGAN to separate high and low memorable images. We then modified the image memorability (while maintaining the identity and other facial features such as age, emotion, etc.) by moving in the positive or negative direction of this hyperplane normal vector. We further analyzed how different layers of the StyleGAN augmented latent space contribute to face memorability. These analyses showed how each individual face attribute makes an image more or less memorable. Most importantly, we evaluated our proposed method for both real and synthesized face images. The proposed method successfully modifies and controls the memorability of real human faces as well as unreal synthesized faces. Our proposed method can be employed in photograph editing applications for social media, learning aids, or advertisement purposes. 每天，我们都会受到许多面孔照片的轰炸，无论是在社交媒体、电视还是智能手机上。从进化的角度来看，面孔是为了被记住，主要是出于生存和个人相关性。然而，所有这些面孔并没有平等的机会留在我们的脑海中。研究表明，可记忆性是图像的固有特征，但目前尚不清楚哪些属性使图像更容易记住。在这项工作中，我们旨在通过提出一种快速方法来修改和控制面部图像的可记忆性来解决这个问题。在我们提出的方法中，我们首先在 StyleGAN 的潜在空间中找到一个超平面来分离高记忆图像和低记忆图像。然后，我们通过沿该超平面法向量的正向或负向移动来修改图像的可记忆性（同时保持身份和其他面部特征，例如年龄、情感等）。我们进一步分析了 StyleGAN 增强潜在空间的不同层如何有助于面部记忆。这些分析显示了每个人脸属性如何使图像或多或少令人难忘。最重要的是，我们针对真实和合成的面部图像评估了我们提出的方法。该方法成功地修改和控制了真实人脸以及非真实合成人脸的可记忆性。我们提出的方法可用于社交媒体、学习辅助或广告目的的照片编辑应用程序。 本文提出一种通过修改StyleGAN潜在空间中的超平面来控制人脸图像可记忆性的方法。 Mohammad Younesi,Yalda Mohsenzadeh cs.CV,cs.LG

title: HMD-EgoPose: Head-Mounted Display-Based Egocentric Marker-Less Tool and Hand Pose Estimation for Augmented Surgical Guidance
title_zh: HMD-EgoPose：基于头戴式显示器的无标记工具和手势估计，用于增强手术指导
comment: Accepted for publication in IJCARS; 17 pages, 3 figures
comments: Accepted for publication in IJCARS; 17 pages, 3 figures
abstract: The success or failure of modern computer-assisted surgery procedures hinges on the precise six-degree-of-freedom (6DoF) position and orientation (pose) estimation of tracked instruments and tissue. In this paper, we present HMD-EgoPose, a single-shot learning-based approach to hand and object pose estimation and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on a benchmark dataset for monocular red-green-blue (RGB) 6DoF marker-less hand and surgical instrument pose tracking. Further, we reveal the capacity of our HMD-EgoPose framework for performant 6DoF pose estimation on a commercially available optical see-through head-mounted display (OST-HMD) through a low-latency streaming approach. Our framework utilized an efficient convolutional neural network (CNN) backbone for multi-scale feature extraction and a set of subnetworks to jointly learn the 6DoF pose representation of the rigid surgical drill instrument and the grasping orientation of the hand of a user. To make our approach accessible to a commercially available OST-HMD, the Microsoft HoloLens 2, we created a pipeline for low-latency video and data communication with a high-performance computing workstation capable of optimized network inference. HMD-EgoPose outperformed current state-of-the-art approaches on a benchmark dataset for surgical tool pose estimation, achieving an average tool 3D vertex error of 11.0 mm on real data and furthering the progress towards a clinically viable marker-free tracking strategy. Through our low-latency streaming approach, we achieved a round trip latency of 199.1 ms for pose estimation and augmented visualization of the tracked model when integrated with the OST-HMD. Our single-shot learned approach was robust to occlusion and complex surfaces and improved on current state-of-the-art approaches to marker-less tool and hand pose estimation.
summary: The success or failure of modern computer-assisted surgery procedures hinges on the precise six-degree-of-freedom (6DoF) position and orientation (pose) estimation of tracked instruments and tissue. In this paper, we present HMD-EgoPose, a single-shot learning-based approach to hand and object pose estimation and demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on a benchmark dataset for monocular red-green-blue (RGB) 6DoF marker-less hand and surgical instrument pose tracking. Further, we reveal the capacity of our HMD-EgoPose framework for performant 6DoF pose estimation on a commercially available optical see-through head-mounted display (OST-HMD) through a low-latency streaming approach. Our framework utilized an efficient convolutional neural network (CNN) backbone for multi-scale feature extraction and a set of subnetworks to jointly learn the 6DoF pose representation of the rigid surgical drill instrument and the grasping orientation of the hand of a user. To make our approach accessible to a commercially available OST-HMD, the Microsoft HoloLens 2, we created a pipeline for low-latency video and data communication with a high-performance computing workstation capable of optimized network inference. HMD-EgoPose outperformed current state-of-the-art approaches on a benchmark dataset for surgical tool pose estimation, achieving an average tool 3D vertex error of 11.0 mm on real data and furthering the progress towards a clinically viable marker-free tracking strategy. Through our low-latency streaming approach, we achieved a round trip latency of 199.1 ms for pose estimation and augmented visualization of the tracked model when integrated with the OST-HMD. Our single-shot learned approach was robust to occlusion and complex surfaces and improved on current state-of-the-art approaches to marker-less tool and hand pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 现代计算机辅助手术的成功或失败取决于跟踪仪器和组织的精确六自由度 (6DoF) 位置和方向（位姿）估计。在本文中，我们提出了 HMD-EgoPose，这是一种基于单次学习的手部和物体姿势估计方法，并在单目红绿蓝 (RGB) 6DoF 无标记手部和手术器械姿势跟踪的基准数据集上展示了最先进的性能。此外，我们还展示了 HMD-EgoPose 框架通过低延迟流方法在商用光学透视头戴式显示器 (OST-HMD) 上进行高性能 6DoF 姿态估计的能力。我们的框架利用高效的卷积神经网络（CNN）主干进行多尺度特征提取，并利用一组子网络来共同学习刚性手术钻具的 6DoF 姿态表示和用户手的抓握方向。为了使我们的方法可用于市售 OST-HMD（Microsoft HoloLens 2），我们创建了一个用于低延迟视频和数据通信的管道，以及能够优化网络推理的高性能计算工作站。 HMD-EgoPose 在手术工具姿势估计基准数据集上的表现优于当前最先进的方法，在真实数据上实现了 11.0 毫米的平均工具 3D 顶点误差，并进一步推动了临床上可行的无标记跟踪策略的进展。通过我们的低延迟流媒体方法，当与 OST-HMD 集成时，我们在姿势估计和跟踪模型的增强可视化方面实现了 199.1 毫秒的往返延迟。我们的单次学习方法对于遮挡和复杂表面具有鲁棒性，并且改进了当前最先进的无标记工具和手部姿势估计方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HMD-EgoPose方法，利用头戴式显示器实现无标记的手部和手术器械六自由度姿态估计，用于增强现实手术导航。
AI.motivation: 现代计算机辅助手术依赖精准的6DoF姿态追踪，但现有标记追踪方法存在侵入性且难以临床应用，需开发无标记、低延迟的实时姿态估计方案。
AI.method: 基于单次学习框架，采用高效CNN提取多尺度特征，通过子网络联合学习手术器械和手部姿态；结合低延迟流式传输技术，实现HoloLens 2与高性能计算工作站的协同推理。
AI.result: 在手术器械姿态估计基准数据集上，3D顶点误差达11.0mm，优于现有方法；系统端到端延迟199.1ms，具备抗遮挡和复杂表面鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: HMD-EgoPose验证了无标记姿态估计在临床手术导航中的可行性，为低延迟、高精度的增强现实手术辅助系统提供了有效技术路径。

title: A spectral-spatial fusion anomaly detection method for hyperspectral imagery
title_zh: 一种高光谱图像光谱空间融合异常检测方法
abstract: In hyperspectral, high-quality spectral signals convey subtle spectral differences to distinguish similar materials, thereby providing unique advantage for anomaly detection. Hence fine spectra of anomalous pixels can be effectively screened out from heterogeneous background pixels. Since the same materials have similar characteristics in spatial and spectral dimension, detection performance can be significantly enhanced by jointing spatial and spectral information. In this paper, a spectralspatial fusion anomaly detection (SSFAD) method is proposed for hyperspectral imagery. First, original spectral signals are mapped to a local linear background space composed of median and mean with high confidence, where saliency weight and feature enhancement strategies are implemented to obtain an initial detection map in spectral domain. Futhermore, to make full use of similarity information of local background around testing pixel, a new detector is designed to extract the local similarity spatial features of patch images in spatial domain. Finally, anomalies are detected by adaptively combining the spectral and spatial detection maps. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method has superior detection performance than traditional methods.
summary: In hyperspectral, high-quality spectral signals convey subtle spectral differences to distinguish similar materials, thereby providing unique advantage for anomaly detection. Hence fine spectra of anomalous pixels can be effectively screened out from heterogeneous background pixels. Since the same materials have similar characteristics in spatial and spectral dimension, detection performance can be significantly enhanced by jointing spatial and spectral information. In this paper, a spectralspatial fusion anomaly detection (SSFAD) method is proposed for hyperspectral imagery. First, original spectral signals are mapped to a local linear background space composed of median and mean with high confidence, where saliency weight and feature enhancement strategies are implemented to obtain an initial detection map in spectral domain. Futhermore, to make full use of similarity information of local background around testing pixel, a new detector is designed to extract the local similarity spatial features of patch images in spatial domain. Finally, anomalies are detected by adaptively combining the spectral and spatial detection maps. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method has superior detection performance than traditional methods.
abstract_zh: 在高光谱中，高质量的光谱信号传达细微的光谱差异，以区分相似的材料，从而为异常检测提供独特的优势。因此，可以有效地从异质背景像素中筛选出异常像素的精细光谱。由于相同的材料在空间和光谱维度上具有相似的特征，因此通过结合空间和光谱信息可以显着增强检测性能。本文提出了一种用于高光谱图像的光谱空间融合异常检测（SSFAD）方法。首先，将原始光谱信号以高置信度映射到由中值和均值组成的局部线性背景空间，其中实施显着性权重和特征增强策略以获得光谱域中的初始检测图。此外，为了充分利用测试像素周围局部背景的相似性信息，设计了一种新的检测器来提取空间域中块图像的局部相似性空间特征。最后，通过自适应地组合光谱和空间检测图来检测异常。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法比传统方法具有优越的检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合光谱与空间信息的高光谱图像异常检测方法（SSFAD），通过融合光谱域和空间域特征提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像中异常像素的光谱特征与背景差异细微，单独依赖光谱信息难以有效检测，需结合空间局部相似性信息增强检测能力。
AI.method: 分三步：1) 将光谱信号映射至由中位数和均值构建的局部线性背景空间，生成光谱检测图；2) 设计空间检测器提取局部背景相似性特征；3) 自适应融合光谱与空间检测图实现最终检测。
AI.result: 实验表明，SSFAD方法在检测性能上优于传统方法，有效提升了高光谱图像异常检测的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 融合光谱与空间信息能显著增强异常检测效果，验证了多模态特征联合分析在高光谱图像处理中的有效性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种结合光谱与空间信息的高光谱图像异常检测方法（SSFAD），通过融合光谱域和空间域特征提升检测性能。

search_text: A spectral-spatial fusion anomaly detection method for hyperspectral imagery 一种高光谱图像光谱空间融合异常检测方法 In hyperspectral, high-quality spectral signals convey subtle spectral differences to distinguish similar materials, thereby providing unique advantage for anomaly detection. Hence fine spectra of anomalous pixels can be effectively screened out from heterogeneous background pixels. Since the same materials have similar characteristics in spatial and spectral dimension, detection performance can be significantly enhanced by jointing spatial and spectral information. In this paper, a spectralspatial fusion anomaly detection (SSFAD) method is proposed for hyperspectral imagery. First, original spectral signals are mapped to a local linear background space composed of median and mean with high confidence, where saliency weight and feature enhancement strategies are implemented to obtain an initial detection map in spectral domain. Futhermore, to make full use of similarity information of local background around testing pixel, a new detector is designed to extract the local similarity spatial features of patch images in spatial domain. Finally, anomalies are detected by adaptively combining the spectral and spatial detection maps. The experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method has superior detection performance than traditional methods. 在高光谱中，高质量的光谱信号传达细微的光谱差异，以区分相似的材料，从而为异常检测提供独特的优势。因此，可以有效地从异质背景像素中筛选出异常像素的精细光谱。由于相同的材料在空间和光谱维度上具有相似的特征，因此通过结合空间和光谱信息可以显着增强检测性能。本文提出了一种用于高光谱图像的光谱空间融合异常检测（SSFAD）方法。首先，将原始光谱信号以高置信度映射到由中值和均值组成的局部线性背景空间，其中实施显着性权重和特征增强策略以获得光谱域中的初始检测图。此外，为了充分利用测试像素周围局部背景的相似性信息，设计了一种新的检测器来提取空间域中块图像的局部相似性空间特征。最后，通过自适应地组合光谱和空间检测图来检测异常。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法比传统方法具有优越的检测性能。 本文提出一种结合光谱与空间信息的高光谱图像异常检测方法（SSFAD），通过融合光谱域和空间域特征提升检测性能。 Zengfu Hou,Siyuan Cheng,Ting Hu eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Ming Sun,Xinyu Wu,Yi Zhou,Jin-Kao Hao,Zhang-Hua Fu
title: A Partition-and-Merge Algorithm for Solving the Steiner Tree Problem in Large Graphs
title_zh: 解决大图斯坦纳树问题的划分合并算法
abstract: The Steiner tree problem aims to determine a minimum edge-weighted tree that spans a given set of terminal vertices from a given graph. In the past decade, a considerable number of algorithms have been developed to solve this computationally challenging problem. However, existing algorithms typically encounter difficulties for solving large instances, i.e., graphs with a high number of vertices and terminals. In this paper, we present a novel partition-and-merge algorithm to effectively solve this problem in large graphs. The algorithm breaks the input network into small subgraphs and then merges the subgraphs in a bottom-up manner. In the merging procedure, partial Steiner trees in the subgraphs are also created and optimized by efficient local optimization. When the merging procedure ends, the algorithm terminates and reports the final solution for the input graph. We evaluated the algorithm on a wide range of benchmark instances, showing that the algorithm outperforms the best-known algorithms on large instances and competes favorably with them on small or medium-sized instances.
summary: The Steiner tree problem aims to determine a minimum edge-weighted tree that spans a given set of terminal vertices from a given graph. In the past decade, a considerable number of algorithms have been developed to solve this computationally challenging problem. However, existing algorithms typically encounter difficulties for solving large instances, i.e., graphs with a high number of vertices and terminals. In this paper, we present a novel partition-and-merge algorithm to effectively solve this problem in large graphs. The algorithm breaks the input network into small subgraphs and then merges the subgraphs in a bottom-up manner. In the merging procedure, partial Steiner trees in the subgraphs are also created and optimized by efficient local optimization. When the merging procedure ends, the algorithm terminates and reports the final solution for the input graph. We evaluated the algorithm on a wide range of benchmark instances, showing that the algorithm outperforms the best-known algorithms on large instances and competes favorably with them on small or medium-sized instances.
abstract_zh: Steiner 树问题旨在确定跨越给定图中的给定终端顶点集的最小边加权树。在过去的十年中，已经开发了相当多的算法来解决这个计算上具有挑战性的问题。然而，现有算法通常在解决大型实例（即具有大量顶点和终端的图）时遇到困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的分区合并算法来有效解决大图中的这一问题。该算法将输入网络分解为小的子图，然后以自下而上的方式合​​并子图。在合并过程中，子图中的部分斯坦纳树也通过有效的局部优化来创建和优化。当合并过程结束时，算法终止并报告输入图的最终解决方案。我们在广泛的基准实例上评估了该算法，结果表明该算法在大型实例上优于最著名的算法，并且在中小型实例上与它们竞争。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于解决大规模图中斯坦纳树问题的分治合并算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理大规模图实例时存在计算效率低下的问题，尤其当顶点和终端数量庞大时难以有效求解。
AI.method: 将输入网络划分为子图并进行自底向上的合并，在合并过程中通过局部优化生成和优化子图的斯坦纳树部分。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试中，该算法在大规模实例上优于现有最佳算法，在中小规模实例上表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了大规模图的斯坦纳树问题，且在不同规模实例中均具有竞争力。

authors_text: Qiao Sun,Xin Huang,Junru Gu,Brian C. Williams,Hang Zhao
title: M2I: From Factored Marginal Trajectory Prediction to Interactive Prediction
title_zh: M2I：从因子式边缘轨迹预测到交互式预测
comment: Accepted at CVPR 2022. Author version with 15 pages, 8 figures, and 3 tables. Code and demo available at paper website: https://tsinghua-mars-lab.github.io/M2I/
comments: Accepted at CVPR 2022. Author version with 15 pages, 8 figures, and 3 tables. Code and demo available at paper website: https://tsinghua-mars-lab.github.io/M2I/
abstract: Predicting future motions of road participants is an important task for driving autonomously in urban scenes. Existing models excel at predicting marginal trajectories for single agents, yet it remains an open question to jointly predict scene compliant trajectories over multiple agents. The challenge is due to exponentially increasing prediction space as a function of the number of agents. In this work, we exploit the underlying relations between interacting agents and decouple the joint prediction problem into marginal prediction problems. Our proposed approach M2I first classifies interacting agents as pairs of influencers and reactors, and then leverages a marginal prediction model and a conditional prediction model to predict trajectories for the influencers and reactors, respectively. The predictions from interacting agents are combined and selected according to their joint likelihoods. Experiments show that our simple but effective approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset interactive prediction benchmark.
summary: Predicting future motions of road participants is an important task for driving autonomously in urban scenes. Existing models excel at predicting marginal trajectories for single agents, yet it remains an open question to jointly predict scene compliant trajectories over multiple agents. The challenge is due to exponentially increasing prediction space as a function of the number of agents. In this work, we exploit the underlying relations between interacting agents and decouple the joint prediction problem into marginal prediction problems. Our proposed approach M2I first classifies interacting agents as pairs of influencers and reactors, and then leverages a marginal prediction model and a conditional prediction model to predict trajectories for the influencers and reactors, respectively. The predictions from interacting agents are combined and selected according to their joint likelihoods. Experiments show that our simple but effective approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Waymo Open Motion Dataset interactive prediction benchmark.
abstract_zh: 预测道路参与者的未来运动是城市场景中自动驾驶的一项重要任务。现有模型擅长预测单个智能体的边缘轨迹，但联合预测多个智能体的场景兼容轨迹仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。挑战在于预测空间随着代理数量呈指数增长。在这项工作中，我们利用交互代理之间的潜在关系，并将联合预测问题解耦为边际预测问题。我们提出的方法 M2I 首先将交互主体分类为影响者和反应者对，然后利用边际预测模型和条件预测模型分别预测影响者和反应者的轨迹。交互代理的预测根据它们的联合可能性进行组合和选择。实验表明，我们简单但有效的方法在 Waymo 开放运动数据集交互式预测基准上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出M2I方法，通过分解多智能体交互轨迹预测问题，实现更准确的联合轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 现有模型难以处理多智能体联合轨迹预测问题，因预测空间随代理数量呈指数增长，导致计算复杂度高且效果差。
AI.method: M2I将交互代理分为影响者和反应者，分别用边缘预测模型和条件预测模型生成轨迹，并通过联合似然组合预测结果。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Motion Dataset交互预测基准测试中，M2I达到最先进的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过解耦交互关系简化多智能体预测问题，验证了分解策略在复杂场景中的有效性。

title: A Note on Machine Learning Approach for Computational Imaging
title_zh: 关于计算成像机器学习方法的注释
abstract: Computational imaging has been playing a vital role in the development of natural sciences. Advances in sensory, information, and computer technologies have further extended the scope of influence of imaging, making digital images an essential component of our daily lives. For the past three decades, we have witnessed phenomenal developments of mathematical and machine learning methods in computational imaging. In this note, we will review some of the recent developments of the machine learning approach for computational imaging and discuss its differences and relations to the mathematical approach. We will demonstrate how we may combine the wisdom from both approaches, discuss the merits and potentials of such a combination and present some of the new computational and theoretical challenges it brings about.
summary: Computational imaging has been playing a vital role in the development of natural sciences. Advances in sensory, information, and computer technologies have further extended the scope of influence of imaging, making digital images an essential component of our daily lives. For the past three decades, we have witnessed phenomenal developments of mathematical and machine learning methods in computational imaging. In this note, we will review some of the recent developments of the machine learning approach for computational imaging and discuss its differences and relations to the mathematical approach. We will demonstrate how we may combine the wisdom from both approaches, discuss the merits and potentials of such a combination and present some of the new computational and theoretical challenges it brings about.
abstract_zh: 计算成像在自然科学的发展中发挥着至关重要的作用。感官、信息和计算机技术的进步进一步扩大了成像的影响范围，使数字图像成为我们日常生活的重要组成部分。在过去的三十年中，我们见证了计算成像领域数学和机器学习方法的显着发展。在本文中，我们将回顾计算成像机器学习方法的一些最新发展，并讨论其与数学方法的差异和关系。我们将展示如何结合这两种方法的智慧，讨论这种组合的优点和潜力，并提出它带来的一些新的计算和理论挑战。

authors_text: Zhize Wu,Huanyi Li,Xiaofeng Wang,Zijun Wu,Le Zou,Lixiang Xu,Ming Tan
title: New Benchmark for Household Garbage Image Recognition
title_zh: 家庭垃圾图像识别新基准
abstract: Household garbage images are usually faced with complex backgrounds, variable illuminations, diverse angles, and changeable shapes, which bring a great difficulty in garbage image classification. Due to the ability to discover problem-specific features, deep learning and especially convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been successfully and widely used for image representation learning. However, available and stable household garbage datasets are insufficient, which seriously limits the development of research and application. Besides, the state of the art in the field of garbage image classification is not entirely clear. To solve this problem, in this study, we built a new open benchmark dataset for household garbage image classification by simulating different lightings, backgrounds, angles, and shapes. This dataset is named 30 Classes of Household Garbage Images (HGI-30), which contains 18,000 images of 30 household garbage classes. The publicly available HGI-30 dataset allows researchers to develop accurate and robust methods for household garbage recognition. We also conducted experiments and performance analysis of the state-of-the-art deep CNN methods on HGI-30, which serves as baseline results on this benchmark.
summary: Household garbage images are usually faced with complex backgrounds, variable illuminations, diverse angles, and changeable shapes, which bring a great difficulty in garbage image classification. Due to the ability to discover problem-specific features, deep learning and especially convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have been successfully and widely used for image representation learning. However, available and stable household garbage datasets are insufficient, which seriously limits the development of research and application. Besides, the state of the art in the field of garbage image classification is not entirely clear. To solve this problem, in this study, we built a new open benchmark dataset for household garbage image classification by simulating different lightings, backgrounds, angles, and shapes. This dataset is named 30 Classes of Household Garbage Images (HGI-30), which contains 18,000 images of 30 household garbage classes. The publicly available HGI-30 dataset allows researchers to develop accurate and robust methods for household garbage recognition. We also conducted experiments and performance analysis of the state-of-the-art deep CNN methods on HGI-30, which serves as baseline results on this benchmark.
abstract_zh: 生活垃圾图像通常面临着复杂的背景、多变的光照、多样的角度、多变的形状，这给垃圾图像分类带来了很大的困难。由于能够发现特定问题的特征，深度学习，尤其是卷积神经网络（CNN）已成功并广泛应用于图像表示学习。然而，可用且稳定的生活垃圾数据集不足，严重限制了研究和应用的发展。此外，垃圾图像分类领域的最新技术还不完全清楚。为了解决这个问题，在本研究中，我们通过模拟不同的照明、背景、角度和形状，构建了一个新的开放基准数据集，用于家庭垃圾图像分类。该数据集被命名为 30 Classes of Household Garbage Images (HGI-30)，包含 30 个家庭垃圾类别的 18,000 张图像。公开的 HGI-30 数据集使研究人员能够开发准确而稳健的家庭垃圾识别方法。我们还在 HGI-30 上对最先进的深度 CNN 方法进行了实验和性能分析，作为该基准测试的基线结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个新的家庭垃圾图像分类基准数据集HGI-30，包含18,000张模拟不同光照、背景、角度和形状的30类家庭垃圾图像，并评估了最新深度卷积神经网络方法的性能。
AI.motivation: 家庭垃圾图像分类面临复杂背景、光照变化、多角度和形状多样性等挑战，但现有公开数据集不足且领域内最优方法尚不明确，限制了相关研究的发展。
AI.method: 通过模拟不同光照条件、背景场景、拍摄角度和物体形态，构建包含30类家庭垃圾的HGI-30数据集，并在该数据集上测试和分析当前最先进的深度卷积神经网络方法。
AI.result: 成功构建HGI-30基准数据集，并提供了多种深度CNN方法在此数据集上的性能基线结果，为后续研究提供参考。
AI.conclusion: HGI-30数据集的发布为家庭垃圾图像识别领域提供了标准化测试平台，有助于推动更准确和鲁棒的垃圾分类方法的研究与应用。

authors_text: Ruiqi Ma,Chi Chen,Bisheng Yang,Deren Li,Haiping Wang,Yangzi Cong,Zongtian Hu
title: CG-SSD: Corner Guided Single Stage 3D Object Detection from LiDAR Point Cloud
title_zh: CG-SSD：利用 LiDAR 点云进行角引导单级 3D 物体检测
comment: 27 pages
comments: 27 pages
abstract: At present, the anchor-based or anchor-free models that use LiDAR point clouds for 3D object detection use the center assigner strategy to infer the 3D bounding boxes. However, in a real world scene, the LiDAR can only acquire a limited object surface point clouds, but the center point of the object does not exist. Obtaining the object by aggregating the incomplete surface point clouds will bring a loss of accuracy in direction and dimension estimation. To address this problem, we propose a corner-guided anchor-free single-stage 3D object detection model (CG-SSD ).Firstly, 3D sparse convolution backbone network composed of residual layers and sub-manifold sparse convolutional layers are used to construct bird's eye view (BEV) features for further deeper feature mining by a lite U-shaped network; Secondly, a novel corner-guided auxiliary module (CGAM) is proposed to incorporate corner supervision signals into the neural network. CGAM is explicitly designed and trained to detect partially visible and invisible corners to obtains a more accurate object feature representation, especially for small or partial occluded objects; Finally, the deep features from both the backbone networks and CGAM module are concatenated and fed into the head module to predict the classification and 3D bounding boxes of the objects in the scene. The experiments demonstrate CG-SSD achieves the state-of-art performance on the ONCE benchmark for supervised 3D object detection using single frame point cloud data, with 62.77%mAP. Additionally, the experiments on ONCE and Waymo Open Dataset show that CGAM can be extended to most anchor-based models which use the BEV feature to detect objects, as a plug-in and bring +1.17%-+14.27%AP improvement.
summary: At present, the anchor-based or anchor-free models that use LiDAR point clouds for 3D object detection use the center assigner strategy to infer the 3D bounding boxes. However, in a real world scene, the LiDAR can only acquire a limited object surface point clouds, but the center point of the object does not exist. Obtaining the object by aggregating the incomplete surface point clouds will bring a loss of accuracy in direction and dimension estimation. To address this problem, we propose a corner-guided anchor-free single-stage 3D object detection model (CG-SSD ).Firstly, 3D sparse convolution backbone network composed of residual layers and sub-manifold sparse convolutional layers are used to construct bird's eye view (BEV) features for further deeper feature mining by a lite U-shaped network; Secondly, a novel corner-guided auxiliary module (CGAM) is proposed to incorporate corner supervision signals into the neural network. CGAM is explicitly designed and trained to detect partially visible and invisible corners to obtains a more accurate object feature representation, especially for small or partial occluded objects; Finally, the deep features from both the backbone networks and CGAM module are concatenated and fed into the head module to predict the classification and 3D bounding boxes of the objects in the scene. The experiments demonstrate CG-SSD achieves the state-of-art performance on the ONCE benchmark for supervised 3D object detection using single frame point cloud data, with 62.77%mAP. Additionally, the experiments on ONCE and Waymo Open Dataset show that CGAM can be extended to most anchor-based models which use the BEV feature to detect objects, as a plug-in and bring +1.17%-+14.27%AP improvement.
abstract_zh: 目前，使用 LiDAR 点云进行 3D 目标检测的基于锚点或无锚点模型使用中心分配器策略来推断 3D 边界框。然而，在现实场景中，激光雷达只能获取有限的物体表面点云，而物体的中心点并不存在。通过聚合不完整的表面点云来获取物体会带来方向和尺寸估计精度的损失。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种角引导无锚单阶段3D目标检测模型（CG-SSD）。首先，使用由残差层和子流形稀疏卷积层组成的3D稀疏卷积主干网络来构造鸟瞰图（BEV）特征，以便通过精简的U形网络进一步进行更深入的特征挖掘；其次，提出了一种新颖的角点引导辅助模块（CGAM），将角点监督信号合并到神经网络中。 CGAM经过明确设计和训练，用于检测部分可见和不可见的角点，以获得更准确的物体特征表示，特别是对于小或部分被遮挡的物体；最后，将主干网络和 CGAM 模块的深层特征连接起来并输入到 head 模块中，以预测场景中对象的分类和 3D 边界框。实验表明，CG-SSD 在使用单帧点云数据进行监督 3D 对象检测的 ONCE 基准上实现了最先进的性能，mAP 为 62.77%。此外，在ONCE和Waymo开放数据集上的实验表明，CGAM可以作为插件扩展到大多数使用BEV特征检测物体的基于anchor的模型，并带来+1.17%-+14.27%的AP提升。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于LiDAR点云的单阶段3D目标检测模型CG-SSD，通过引入角落引导机制提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 现有基于锚点或无锚点的LiDAR点云3D检测方法依赖物体中心点，但实际场景中LiDAR获取的表面点云有限，中心点可能缺失，导致方向和尺寸估计误差。
AI.method: 构建包含残差层和子流形稀疏卷积层的3D稀疏卷积主干网络提取BEV特征；设计角落引导辅助模块（CGAM）检测可见/不可见角落，增强小物体及部分遮挡物体的特征表示；融合主干网络与CGAM的深层特征进行分类和3D边界框预测。
AI.result: 在ONCE基准测试中，CG-SSD单帧点云检测mAP达62.77%；CGAM模块可扩展至多数基于BEV的锚点模型，在ONCE和Waymo数据集上提升1.17%-14.27%AP。
AI.conclusion: CG-SSD通过角落引导机制有效解决了中心点缺失问题，尤其提升小物体及遮挡场景检测性能，CGAM模块具有通用性可适配多种模型。

search_text: CG-SSD: Corner Guided Single Stage 3D Object Detection from LiDAR Point Cloud CG-SSD：利用 LiDAR 点云进行角引导单级 3D 物体检测 At present, the anchor-based or anchor-free models that use LiDAR point clouds for 3D object detection use the center assigner strategy to infer the 3D bounding boxes. However, in a real world scene, the LiDAR can only acquire a limited object surface point clouds, but the center point of the object does not exist. Obtaining the object by aggregating the incomplete surface point clouds will bring a loss of accuracy in direction and dimension estimation. To address this problem, we propose a corner-guided anchor-free single-stage 3D object detection model (CG-SSD ).Firstly, 3D sparse convolution backbone network composed of residual layers and sub-manifold sparse convolutional layers are used to construct bird's eye view (BEV) features for further deeper feature mining by a lite U-shaped network; Secondly, a novel corner-guided auxiliary module (CGAM) is proposed to incorporate corner supervision signals into the neural network. CGAM is explicitly designed and trained to detect partially visible and invisible corners to obtains a more accurate object feature representation, especially for small or partial occluded objects; Finally, the deep features from both the backbone networks and CGAM module are concatenated and fed into the head module to predict the classification and 3D bounding boxes of the objects in the scene. The experiments demonstrate CG-SSD achieves the state-of-art performance on the ONCE benchmark for supervised 3D object detection using single frame point cloud data, with 62.77%mAP. Additionally, the experiments on ONCE and Waymo Open Dataset show that CGAM can be extended to most anchor-based models which use the BEV feature to detect objects, as a plug-in and bring +1.17%-+14.27%AP improvement. 目前，使用 LiDAR 点云进行 3D 目标检测的基于锚点或无锚点模型使用中心分配器策略来推断 3D 边界框。然而，在现实场景中，激光雷达只能获取有限的物体表面点云，而物体的中心点并不存在。通过聚合不完整的表面点云来获取物体会带来方向和尺寸估计精度的损失。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种角引导无锚单阶段3D目标检测模型（CG-SSD）。首先，使用由残差层和子流形稀疏卷积层组成的3D稀疏卷积主干网络来构造鸟瞰图（BEV）特征，以便通过精简的U形网络进一步进行更深入的特征挖掘；其次，提出了一种新颖的角点引导辅助模块（CGAM），将角点监督信号合并到神经网络中。 CGAM经过明确设计和训练，用于检测部分可见和不可见的角点，以获得更准确的物体特征表示，特别是对于小或部分被遮挡的物体；最后，将主干网络和 CGAM 模块的深层特征连接起来并输入到 head 模块中，以预测场景中对象的分类和 3D 边界框。实验表明，CG-SSD 在使用单帧点云数据进行监督 3D 对象检测的 ONCE 基准上实现了最先进的性能，mAP 为 62.77%。此外，在ONCE和Waymo开放数据集上的实验表明，CGAM可以作为插件扩展到大多数使用BEV特征检测物体的基于anchor的模型，并带来+1.17%-+14.27%的AP提升。 本文提出一种基于LiDAR点云的单阶段3D目标检测模型CG-SSD，通过引入角落引导机制提升检测精度。 Ruiqi Ma,Chi Chen,Bisheng Yang,Deren Li,Haiping Wang,Yangzi Cong,Zongtian Hu cs.CV

title: Loss as the Inconsistency of a Probabilistic Dependency Graph: Choose Your Model, Not Your Loss Function
title_zh: 概率依赖图的不一致性造成的损失：选择您的模型，而不是损失函数
comment: to appear in AISTATS22
comments: to appear in AISTATS22
abstract: In a world blessed with a great diversity of loss functions, we argue that that choice between them is not a matter of taste or pragmatics, but of model. Probabilistic depencency graphs (PDGs) are probabilistic models that come equipped with a measure of "inconsistency". We prove that many standard loss functions arise as the inconsistency of a natural PDG describing the appropriate scenario, and use the same approach to justify a well-known connection between regularizers and priors. We also show that the PDG inconsistency captures a large class of statistical divergences, and detail benefits of thinking of them in this way, including an intuitive visual language for deriving inequalities between them. In variational inference, we find that the ELBO, a somewhat opaque objective for latent variable models, and variants of it arise for free out of uncontroversial modeling assumptions -- as do simple graphical proofs of their corresponding bounds. Finally, we observe that inconsistency becomes the log partition function (free energy) in the setting where PDGs are factor graphs.
summary: In a world blessed with a great diversity of loss functions, we argue that that choice between them is not a matter of taste or pragmatics, but of model. Probabilistic depencency graphs (PDGs) are probabilistic models that come equipped with a measure of "inconsistency". We prove that many standard loss functions arise as the inconsistency of a natural PDG describing the appropriate scenario, and use the same approach to justify a well-known connection between regularizers and priors. We also show that the PDG inconsistency captures a large class of statistical divergences, and detail benefits of thinking of them in this way, including an intuitive visual language for deriving inequalities between them. In variational inference, we find that the ELBO, a somewhat opaque objective for latent variable models, and variants of it arise for free out of uncontroversial modeling assumptions -- as do simple graphical proofs of their corresponding bounds. Finally, we observe that inconsistency becomes the log partition function (free energy) in the setting where PDGs are factor graphs.
abstract_zh: 在一个损失函数多种多样的世界中，我们认为它们之间的选择不是品味或实用的问题，而是模型的问题。概率依赖图 (PDG) 是配备了“不一致性”度量的概率模型。我们证明，许多标准损失函数是由于描述适当场景的自然 PDG 的不一致而出现的，并使用相同的方法来证明正则化器和先验之间众所周知的联系。我们还表明，PDG 不一致捕获了大量统计差异，并详细说明了以这种方式思考它们的好处，包括用于推导它们之间的不平等的直观视觉语言。在变分推理中，我们发现 ELBO（潜变量模型的一个有点不透明的目标）及其变体是从无争议的建模假设中免费出现的——就像它们相应界限的简单图形证明一样。最后，我们观察到，在 PDG 是因子图的情况下，不一致变成了对数配分函数（自由能）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出概率依赖图（PDG）的不一致性可作为损失函数的理论基础，通过模型结构推导出多种标准损失函数及变分推断中的ELBO目标。
AI.motivation: 现有损失函数的选择常依赖经验而非理论依据，本文旨在建立损失函数与概率模型结构之间的本质联系，提供统一的理论框架。
AI.method: 基于概率依赖图的不一致性度量，通过数学证明将标准损失函数、正则化项与先验分布关联，并在变分推断中推导ELBO的自然出现机制。
AI.result: 证明了多种损失函数源于PDG不一致性，揭示了正则化与先验的联系，展示了统计散度的统一视角，并在变分推断中实现了ELBO的直观推导。
AI.conclusion: 将损失函数视为模型不一致性可提供直观的理论解释，简化复杂模型分析，并为新损失函数设计提供统一框架。

authors_text: Danny Driess,Zhiao Huang,Yunzhu Li,Russ Tedrake,Marc Toussaint
title: Learning Multi-Object Dynamics with Compositional Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: 使用组合神经辐射场学习多对象动力学
comment: v3: real robot exp
comments: v3: real robot exp
abstract: We present a method to learn compositional multi-object dynamics models from image observations based on implicit object encoders, Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs), and graph neural networks. NeRFs have become a popular choice for representing scenes due to their strong 3D prior. However, most NeRF approaches are trained on a single scene, representing the whole scene with a global model, making generalization to novel scenes, containing different numbers of objects, challenging. Instead, we present a compositional, object-centric auto-encoder framework that maps multiple views of the scene to a set of latent vectors representing each object separately. The latent vectors parameterize individual NeRFs from which the scene can be reconstructed. Based on those latent vectors, we train a graph neural network dynamics model in the latent space to achieve compositionality for dynamics prediction. A key feature of our approach is that the latent vectors are forced to encode 3D information through the NeRF decoder, which enables us to incorporate structural priors in learning the dynamics models, making long-term predictions more stable compared to several baselines. Simulated and real world experiments show that our method can model and learn the dynamics of compositional scenes including rigid and deformable objects. Video: https://dannydriess.github.io/compnerfdyn/
summary: We present a method to learn compositional multi-object dynamics models from image observations based on implicit object encoders, Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs), and graph neural networks. NeRFs have become a popular choice for representing scenes due to their strong 3D prior. However, most NeRF approaches are trained on a single scene, representing the whole scene with a global model, making generalization to novel scenes, containing different numbers of objects, challenging. Instead, we present a compositional, object-centric auto-encoder framework that maps multiple views of the scene to a set of latent vectors representing each object separately. The latent vectors parameterize individual NeRFs from which the scene can be reconstructed. Based on those latent vectors, we train a graph neural network dynamics model in the latent space to achieve compositionality for dynamics prediction. A key feature of our approach is that the latent vectors are forced to encode 3D information through the NeRF decoder, which enables us to incorporate structural priors in learning the dynamics models, making long-term predictions more stable compared to several baselines. Simulated and real world experiments show that our method can model and learn the dynamics of compositional scenes including rigid and deformable objects. Video: https://dannydriess.github.io/compnerfdyn/
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于隐式对象编码器、神经辐射场（NeRF）和图神经网络的图像观察来学习组合多对象动力学模型的方法。 NeRF 因其强大的 3D 先验而成为表示场景的流行选择。然而，大多数 NeRF 方法都是在单个场景上进行训练，用全局模型表示整个场景，这使得泛化到包含不同数量对象的新场景具有挑战性。相反，我们提出了一个组合的、以对象为中心的自动编码器框架，它将场景的多个视图映射到一组分别表示每个对象的潜在向量。潜在向量参数化各个 NeRF，从中可以重建场景。基于这些潜在向量，我们在潜在空间中训练图神经网络动力学模型，以实现动态预测的组合性。我们方法的一个关键特征是，潜在向量被迫通过 NeRF 解码器对 3D 信息进行编码，这使我们能够在学习动态模型时结合结构先验，使长期预测与多个基线相比更加稳定。模拟和现实世界实验表明，我们的方法可以建模和学习包括刚性和可变形对象在内的组合场景的动态。视频：https://dannydriess.github.io/compnerfdyn/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式物体编码器、神经辐射场（NeRF）和图神经网络的组合多物体动力学模型学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF方法针对单一场景训练，难以泛化到包含不同物体数量的新场景，且缺乏对物体组合动态的建模能力。
AI.method: 设计组合式物体中心自编码框架，通过多视角图像生成每个物体的潜在向量，用潜在向量参数化个体NeRF进行场景重建，并基于图神经网络在潜在空间建模动力学。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效建模包含刚性与变形物体的组合场景动力学，在模拟和真实世界数据中均优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过NeRF解码器强制编码3D结构先验，该方法在动力学预测稳定性及组合性方面优于现有方法。

motivation: 传统NeRF方法针对单一场景训练，难以泛化到包含不同物体数量的新场景，且缺乏对物体组合动态的建模能力。
method: 设计组合式物体中心自编码框架，通过多视角图像生成每个物体的潜在向量，用潜在向量参数化个体NeRF进行场景重建，并基于图神经网络在潜在空间建模动力学。
result: 实验表明该方法能有效建模包含刚性与变形物体的组合场景动力学，在模拟和真实世界数据中均优于基线方法。
conclusion: 通过NeRF解码器强制编码3D结构先验，该方法在动力学预测稳定性及组合性方面优于现有方法。
search_text: Learning Multi-Object Dynamics with Compositional Neural Radiance Fields 使用组合神经辐射场学习多对象动力学 We present a method to learn compositional multi-object dynamics models from image observations based on implicit object encoders, Neural Radiance Fields (NeRFs), and graph neural networks. NeRFs have become a popular choice for representing scenes due to their strong 3D prior. However, most NeRF approaches are trained on a single scene, representing the whole scene with a global model, making generalization to novel scenes, containing different numbers of objects, challenging. Instead, we present a compositional, object-centric auto-encoder framework that maps multiple views of the scene to a set of latent vectors representing each object separately. The latent vectors parameterize individual NeRFs from which the scene can be reconstructed. Based on those latent vectors, we train a graph neural network dynamics model in the latent space to achieve compositionality for dynamics prediction. A key feature of our approach is that the latent vectors are forced to encode 3D information through the NeRF decoder, which enables us to incorporate structural priors in learning the dynamics models, making long-term predictions more stable compared to several baselines. Simulated and real world experiments show that our method can model and learn the dynamics of compositional scenes including rigid and deformable objects. Video: https://dannydriess.github.io/compnerfdyn/ 我们提出了一种基于隐式对象编码器、神经辐射场（NeRF）和图神经网络的图像观察来学习组合多对象动力学模型的方法。 NeRF 因其强大的 3D 先验而成为表示场景的流行选择。然而，大多数 NeRF 方法都是在单个场景上进行训练，用全局模型表示整个场景，这使得泛化到包含不同数量对象的新场景具有挑战性。相反，我们提出了一个组合的、以对象为中心的自动编码器框架，它将场景的多个视图映射到一组分别表示每个对象的潜在向量。潜在向量参数化各个 NeRF，从中可以重建场景。基于这些潜在向量，我们在潜在空间中训练图神经网络动力学模型，以实现动态预测的组合性。我们方法的一个关键特征是，潜在向量被迫通过 NeRF 解码器对 3D 信息进行编码，这使我们能够在学习动态模型时结合结构先验，使长期预测与多个基线相比更加稳定。模拟和现实世界实验表明，我们的方法可以建模和学习包括刚性和可变形对象在内的组合场景的动态。视频：https://dannydriess.github.io/compnerfdyn/ 本文提出一种基于隐式物体编码器、神经辐射场（NeRF）和图神经网络的组合多物体动力学模型学习方法。 Danny Driess,Zhiao Huang,Yunzhu Li,Russ Tedrake,Marc Toussaint cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Hyounghun Kim,Doo Soon Kim,Seunghyun Yoon,Franck Dernoncourt,Trung Bui,Mohit Bansal
title: CAISE: Conversational Agent for Image Search and Editing
title_zh: CAISE：用于图像搜索和编辑的会话代理
comment: AAAI 2022 (11 pages)
comments: AAAI 2022 (11 pages)
abstract: Demand for image editing has been increasing as users' desire for expression is also increasing. However, for most users, image editing tools are not easy to use since the tools require certain expertise in photo effects and have complex interfaces. Hence, users might need someone to help edit their images, but having a personal dedicated human assistant for every user is impossible to scale. For that reason, an automated assistant system for image editing is desirable. Additionally, users want more image sources for diverse image editing works, and integrating an image search functionality into the editing tool is a potential remedy for this demand. Thus, we propose a dataset of an automated Conversational Agent for Image Search and Editing (CAISE). To our knowledge, this is the first dataset that provides conversational image search and editing annotations, where the agent holds a grounded conversation with users and helps them to search and edit images according to their requests. To build such a system, we first collect image search and editing conversations between pairs of annotators. The assistant-annotators are equipped with a customized image search and editing tool to address the requests from the user-annotators. The functions that the assistant-annotators conduct with the tool are recorded as executable commands, allowing the trained system to be useful for real-world application execution. We also introduce a generator-extractor baseline model for this task, which can adaptively select the source of the next token (i.e., from the vocabulary or from textual/visual contexts) for the executable command. This serves as a strong starting point while still leaving a large human-machine performance gap for useful future work. Our code and dataset are publicly available at: https://github.com/hyounghk/CAISE

However, for most users, image editing tools are not easy to use since the tools require certain expertise in photo effects and have complex interfaces. Hence, users might need someone to help edit their images, but having a personal dedicated human assistant for every user is impossible to scale. For that reason, an automated assistant system for image editing is desirable. Additionally, users want more image sources for diverse image editing works, and integrating an image search functionality into the editing tool is a potential remedy for this demand. Thus, we propose a dataset of an automated Conversational Agent for Image Search and Editing (CAISE). To our knowledge, this is the first dataset that provides conversational image search and editing annotations, where the agent holds a grounded conversation with users and helps them to search and edit images according to their requests. To build such a system, we first collect image search and editing conversations between pairs of annotators. The assistant-annotators are equipped with a customized image search and editing tool to address the requests from the user-annotators. The functions that the assistant-annotators conduct with the tool are recorded as executable commands, allowing the trained system to be useful for real-world application execution. We also introduce a generator-extractor baseline model for this task, which can adaptively select the source of the next token (i.e., from the vocabulary or from textual/visual contexts) for the executable command. This serves as a strong starting point while still leaving a large human-machine performance gap for useful future work. Our code and dataset are publicly available at: https://github.com/hyounghk/CAISE
abstract_zh: 随着用户表达欲望的增强，图像编辑的需求也不断增加。然而，对于大多数用户来说，图像编辑工具并不容易使用，因为这些工具需要一定的照片效果专业知识，并且界面复杂。因此，用户可能需要有人帮助编辑他们的图像，但为每个用户配备一个专用的人工助理是不可能扩展的。因此，需要一种用于图像编辑的自动化辅助系统。此外，用户希望有更多的图像源来进行多样化的图像编辑工作，将图像搜索功能集成到编辑工具中是解决这一需求的潜在补救措施。因此，我们提出了一个用于图像搜索和编辑的自动化对话代理（CAISE）的数据集。据我们所知，这是第一个提供会话式图像搜索和编辑注释的数据集，代理与用户进行基础对话，并帮助他们根据请求搜索和编辑图像。为了构建这样的系统，我们首先收集注释者之间的图像搜索和编辑对话。助理注释者配备了定制的图像搜索和编辑工具，以满足用户注释者的请求。助理注释者使用该工具执行的功能被记录为可执行命令，使经过训练的系统可用于现实世界的应用程序执行。我们还为此任务引入了生成器-提取器基线模型，它可以自适应地为可执行命令选择下一个标记的来源（即从词汇表或从文本/视觉上下文）。这是一个强有力的起点，同时仍然为未来的有用工作留下了巨大的人机性能差距。我们的代码和数据集可公开获取：https://github.com/hyounghk/CAISE

AI.tldr: 本文提出CAISE数据集，构建可对话的图像搜索与编辑代理系统，解决用户图像编辑需求与工具复杂性之间的矛盾。
AI.motivation: 用户对图像编辑需求增长但现有工具操作复杂，需自动化助手系统；同时需整合图像搜索功能以扩展编辑素材来源。
AI.method: 收集标注者间的对话数据，助理标注者使用定制工具处理请求并记录可执行命令；提出生成器-提取器基线模型选择命令来源。
AI.result: 公开CAISE数据集及代码，基线模型实现初步功能但存在显著的人机性能差距。
AI.conclusion: CAISE为对话式图像编辑提供首个数据集，基线模型验证可行性，未来需进一步缩小人机性能差距。

title: Explanatory Paradigms in Neural Networks
title_zh: 神经网络中的解释范式
comment: To be published in Signal Processing Magazine
comments: To be published in Signal Processing Magazine
abstract: In this article, we present a leap-forward expansion to the study of explainability in neural networks by considering explanations as answers to abstract reasoning-based questions. With $P$ as the prediction from a neural network, these questions are `Why P?', `What if not P?', and `Why P, rather than Q?' for a given contrast prediction $Q$. The answers to these questions are observed correlations, observed counterfactuals, and observed contrastive explanations respectively. Together, these explanations constitute the abductive reasoning scheme. We term the three explanatory schemes as observed explanatory paradigms. The term observed refers to the specific case of post-hoc explainability, when an explanatory technique explains the decision $P$ after a trained neural network has made the decision $P$. The primary advantage of viewing explanations through the lens of abductive reasoning-based questions is that explanations can be used as reasons while making decisions. The post-hoc field of explainability, that previously only justified decisions, becomes active by being involved in the decision making process and providing limited, but relevant and contextual interventions. The contributions of this article are: ($i$) realizing explanations as reasoning paradigms, ($ii$) providing a probabilistic definition of observed explanations and their completeness, ($iii$) creating a taxonomy for evaluation of explanations, and ($iv$) positioning gradient-based complete explanainability's replicability and reproducibility across multiple applications and data modalities, ($v$) code repositories, publicly available at https://github.com/olivesgatech/Explanatory-Paradigms.
summary: In this article, we present a leap-forward expansion to the study of explainability in neural networks by considering explanations as answers to abstract reasoning-based questions. With $P$ as the prediction from a neural network, these questions are `Why P?', `What if not P?', and `Why P, rather than Q?' for a given contrast prediction $Q$. The answers to these questions are observed correlations, observed counterfactuals, and observed contrastive explanations respectively. Together, these explanations constitute the abductive reasoning scheme. We term the three explanatory schemes as observed explanatory paradigms. The term observed refers to the specific case of post-hoc explainability, when an explanatory technique explains the decision $P$ after a trained neural network has made the decision $P$. The primary advantage of viewing explanations through the lens of abductive reasoning-based questions is that explanations can be used as reasons while making decisions. The post-hoc field of explainability, that previously only justified decisions, becomes active by being involved in the decision making process and providing limited, but relevant and contextual interventions. The contributions of this article are: ($i$) realizing explanations as reasoning paradigms, ($ii$) providing a probabilistic definition of observed explanations and their completeness, ($iii$) creating a taxonomy for evaluation of explanations, and ($iv$) positioning gradient-based complete explanainability's replicability and reproducibility across multiple applications and data modalities, ($v$) code repositories, publicly available at https://github.com/olivesgatech/Explanatory-Paradigms.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们通过将解释视为基于抽象推理的问题的答案，对神经网络的可解释性研究进行了跨越式扩展。将 $P$ 作为神经网络的预测，这些问题是“为什么是 P？”、“如果不是 P 会怎样？”以及“为什么是 P，而不是 Q？”对于给定的对比度预测 $Q$。这些问题的答案分别是观察到的相关性、观察到的反事实和观察到的对比解释。这些解释共同构成了溯因推理方案。我们将这三种解释方案称为观察到的解释范式。观察到的术语是指事后可解释性的具体情况，即在经过训练的神经网络做出决策 $P$ 之后，解释性技术解释了决策 $P$。通过基于溯因推理的问题来看待解释的主要优点是，解释可以在做出决策时用作理由。可解释性的事后领域，以前只是合理的决策，通过参与决策过程并提供有限但相关和情境的干预而变得活跃。本文的贡献是：($i$) 将解释实现为推理范式，($ii$) 提供观察到的解释及其完整性的概率定义，($iii$) 创建用于评估解释的分类法，以及 ($iv$) 定位基于梯度的完整可解释性跨多种应用程序和数据模式的可复制性和再现性，($v$) 代码存储库，可在以下位置公开获取https://github.com/olivesgatech/Explanatory-Paradigms。

AI.tldr: 本文将神经网络的可解释性研究扩展为基于归纳推理的解释范式，提出通过回答‘Why P?’、‘What if not P?’和‘Why P rather than Q?’等问题来生成解释。
AI.motivation: 传统事后可解释性方法仅用于事后验证决策，无法主动参与决策过程。本文旨在通过归纳推理框架使解释成为决策过程中的主动干预因素。
AI.method: 定义三种观察性解释范式（相关性、反事实、对比解释），建立概率化解释定义与完备性标准，并构建解释评估分类体系。
AI.result: 提出观察性解释范式理论框架，实现梯度基解释方法的跨应用复现性验证，开源代码库支持多模态数据应用。
AI.conclusion: 通过将解释建模为归纳推理过程，使可解释性从被动验证转向主动决策支持，为神经网络解释性研究提供理论框架与评估基准。

motivation: 传统事后可解释性方法仅用于事后验证决策，无法主动参与决策过程。本文旨在通过归纳推理框架使解释成为决策过程中的主动干预因素。
method: 定义三种观察性解释范式（相关性、反事实、对比解释），建立概率化解释定义与完备性标准，并构建解释评估分类体系。
result: 提出观察性解释范式理论框架，实现梯度基解释方法的跨应用复现性验证，开源代码库支持多模态数据应用。
conclusion: 通过将解释建模为归纳推理过程，使可解释性从被动验证转向主动决策支持，为神经网络解释性研究提供理论框架与评估基准。
search_text: Explanatory Paradigms in Neural Networks 神经网络中的解释范式 In this article, we present a leap-forward expansion to the study of explainability in neural networks by considering explanations as answers to abstract reasoning-based questions. With $P$ as the prediction from a neural network, these questions are `Why P?', `What if not P?', and `Why P, rather than Q?' for a given contrast prediction $Q$. The answers to these questions are observed correlations, observed counterfactuals, and observed contrastive explanations respectively. Together, these explanations constitute the abductive reasoning scheme. We term the three explanatory schemes as observed explanatory paradigms. The term observed refers to the specific case of post-hoc explainability, when an explanatory technique explains the decision $P$ after a trained neural network has made the decision $P$. The primary advantage of viewing explanations through the lens of abductive reasoning-based questions is that explanations can be used as reasons while making decisions. The post-hoc field of explainability, that previously only justified decisions, becomes active by being involved in the decision making process and providing limited, but relevant and contextual interventions. The contributions of this article are: ($i$) realizing explanations as reasoning paradigms, ($ii$) providing a probabilistic definition of observed explanations and their completeness, ($iii$) creating a taxonomy for evaluation of explanations, and ($iv$) positioning gradient-based complete explanainability's replicability and reproducibility across multiple applications and data modalities, ($v$) code repositories, publicly available at https://github.com/olivesgatech/Explanatory-Paradigms. 在本文中，我们通过将解释视为基于抽象推理的问题的答案，对神经网络的可解释性研究进行了跨越式扩展。将 $P$ 作为神经网络的预测，这些问题是“为什么是 P？”、“如果不是 P 会怎样？”以及“为什么是 P，而不是 Q？”对于给定的对比度预测 $Q$。这些问题的答案分别是观察到的相关性、观察到的反事实和观察到的对比解释。这些解释共同构成了溯因推理方案。我们将这三种解释方案称为观察到的解释范式。观察到的术语是指事后可解释性的具体情况，即在经过训练的神经网络做出决策 $P$ 之后，解释性技术解释了决策 $P$。通过基于溯因推理的问题来看待解释的主要优点是，解释可以在做出决策时用作理由。可解释性的事后领域，以前只是合理的决策，通过参与决策过程并提供有限但相关和情境的干预而变得活跃。本文的贡献是：($i$) 将解释实现为推理范式，($ii$) 提供观察到的解释及其完整性的概率定义，($iii$) 创建用于评估解释的分类法，以及 ($iv$) 定位基于梯度的完整可解释性跨多种应用程序和数据模式的可复制性和再现性，($v$) 代码存储库，可在以下位置公开获取https://github.com/olivesgatech/Explanatory-Paradigms。 本文将神经网络的可解释性研究扩展为基于归纳推理的解释范式，提出通过回答‘Why P?’、‘What if not P?’和‘Why P rather than Q?’等问题来生成解释。 Ghassan AlRegib,Mohit Prabhushankar cs.LG,cs.CV

title: Sky Computing: Accelerating Geo-distributed Computing in Federated Learning
title_zh: 天空计算：加速联邦学习中的地理分布式计算
abstract: Federated learning is proposed by Google to safeguard data privacy through training models locally on users' devices. However, with deep learning models growing in size to achieve better results, it becomes increasingly difficult to accommodate the whole model on one single device. Thus, model parallelism is then used to divide the model weights among several devices. With this logic, the approach currently used evenly allocates weights among devices. However, in reality, a computation bottleneck may occur resulting from variant computing power of different users' devices. To address this problem, load balancing is needed to allocate the model weights based on the computational capability of the device. In this paper, we proposed Sky Computing, a load-balanced model parallelism framework to adaptively allocate the weights to devices. Sky Computing outperforms the baseline method by 55% in training time when training 160-layer BERT with 64 nodes. The source code can be found at https://github.com/hpcaitech/SkyComputing.
summary: Federated learning is proposed by Google to safeguard data privacy through training models locally on users' devices. However, with deep learning models growing in size to achieve better results, it becomes increasingly difficult to accommodate the whole model on one single device. Thus, model parallelism is then used to divide the model weights among several devices. With this logic, the approach currently used evenly allocates weights among devices. However, in reality, a computation bottleneck may occur resulting from variant computing power of different users' devices. To address this problem, load balancing is needed to allocate the model weights based on the computational capability of the device. In this paper, we proposed Sky Computing, a load-balanced model parallelism framework to adaptively allocate the weights to devices. Sky Computing outperforms the baseline method by 55% in training time when training 160-layer BERT with 64 nodes. The source code can be found at https://github.com/hpcaitech/SkyComputing.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是由谷歌提出的，旨在通过在用户设备上本地训练模型来保护数据隐私。然而，随着深度学习模型规模不断扩大以取得更好的结果，在一台设备上容纳整个模型变得越来越困难。因此，然后使用模型并行性将模型权重分配给多个设备。通过这种逻辑，当前使用的方法在设备之间均匀分配权重。然而，实际上，由于不同用户设备的计算能力不同，可能会出现计算瓶颈。为了解决这个问题，需要负载均衡，根据设备的计算能力来分配模型权重。在本文中，我们提出了 SkyComputing，一种负载平衡模型并行框架，用于自适应地将权重分配给设备。在训练 64 个节点的 160 层 BERT 时，SkyComputing 的训练时间比基线方法提高了 55%。源代码可以在 https://github.com/hpcaitech/SkyComputing 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Sky Computing框架，通过负载均衡的模型并行方法优化联邦学习中的地理分布式计算效率。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习模型规模增大，单一设备难以承载完整模型，现有均匀分配权重的方法因设备计算能力差异导致计算瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计基于设备计算能力动态分配模型权重的自适应负载均衡框架Sky Computing，优化模型并行策略。
AI.result: 在160层BERT模型64节点训练中，相比基线方法训练时间减少55%。
AI.conclusion: Sky Computing通过计算能力感知的权重分配有效解决设备异构性问题，显著提升联邦学习训练效率。

authors_text: Qianli Feng,Viraj Shah,Raghudeep Gadde,Pietro Perona,Aleix Martinez
title: Near Perfect GAN Inversion
title_zh: 近乎完美的 GAN 反转
abstract: To edit a real photo using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), we need a GAN inversion algorithm to identify the latent vector that perfectly reproduces it. Unfortunately, whereas existing inversion algorithms can synthesize images similar to real photos, they cannot generate the identical clones needed in most applications. Here, we derive an algorithm that achieves near perfect reconstructions of photos. Rather than relying on encoder- or optimization-based methods to find an inverse mapping on a fixed generator $G(\cdot)$, we derive an approach to locally adjust $G(\cdot)$ to more optimally represent the photos we wish to synthesize. This is done by locally tweaking the learned mapping $G(\cdot)$ s.t. $\| {\bf x} - G({\bf z}) \|<ε$, with ${\bf x}$ the photo we wish to reproduce, ${\bf z}$ the latent vector, $\|\cdot\|$ an appropriate metric, and $ε> 0$ a small scalar. We show that this approach can not only produce synthetic images that are indistinguishable from the real photos we wish to replicate, but that these images are readily editable. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the derived algorithm on a variety of datasets including human faces, animals, and cars, and discuss its importance for diversity and inclusion.
summary: To edit a real photo using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs), we need a GAN inversion algorithm to identify the latent vector that perfectly reproduces it. Unfortunately, whereas existing inversion algorithms can synthesize images similar to real photos, they cannot generate the identical clones needed in most applications. Here, we derive an algorithm that achieves near perfect reconstructions of photos. Rather than relying on encoder- or optimization-based methods to find an inverse mapping on a fixed generator $G(\cdot)$, we derive an approach to locally adjust $G(\cdot)$ to more optimally represent the photos we wish to synthesize. This is done by locally tweaking the learned mapping $G(\cdot)$ s.t. $\| {\bf x} - G({\bf z}) \|<ε$, with ${\bf x}$ the photo we wish to reproduce, ${\bf z}$ the latent vector, $\|\cdot\|$ an appropriate metric, and $ε> 0$ a small scalar. We show that this approach can not only produce synthetic images that are indistinguishable from the real photos we wish to replicate, but that these images are readily editable. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the derived algorithm on a variety of datasets including human faces, animals, and cars, and discuss its importance for diversity and inclusion.
abstract_zh: 要使用生成对抗网络 (GAN) 编辑真实照片，我们需要一个 GAN 反转算法来识别完美再现它的潜在向量。不幸的是，虽然现有的反演算法可以合成类似于真实照片的图像，但它们无法生成大多数应用程序所需的相同克隆。在这里，我们推导出一种算法，可以实现近乎完美的照片重建。我们不是依靠基于编码器或基于优化的方法在固定生成器 $G(\cdot)$ 上找到逆映射，而是导出一种局部调整 $G(\cdot)$ 的方法，以更优化地表示我们希望合成的照片。这是通过本地调整学习到的映射 $G(\cdot)$ s.t 来完成的。 $\| {\bf x} - G({\bf z}) \|<ε$，${\bf x}$ 是我们希望重现的照片，${\bf z}$ 是潜在向量，$\|\cdot\|$ 是一个适当的度量，$ε> 0$ 是一个小标量。我们证明，这种方法不仅可以生成与我们希望复制的真实照片无法区分的合成图像，而且这些图像很容易编辑。我们展示了派生算法在包括人脸、动物和汽车在内的各种数据集上的有效性，并讨论了其对于多样性和包容性的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近似完美的GAN反演算法，用于生成与真实照片几乎完全一致的图像。
AI.motivation: 现有的GAN反演算法无法生成与真实照片完全一致的图像，无法满足大多数应用需求，因此需要一种更优的反演方法。
AI.method: 本文通过局部调整生成器$G(\\cdot)$，使其更精确地表示需要合成的照片，以达到$ \| {\bf x} - G({\bf z}) \| < ε $的重建效果。
AI.result: 该方法可以生成与真实照片几乎无法区分的合成图像，并且这些图像易于编辑。实验在人脸、动物和汽车等多种数据集上验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在图像生成和编辑方面具有重要应用价值，对于多样性和包容性也具有重要意义。

title: A modification of the conjugate direction method for motion estimation
title_zh: 运动估计共轭方向法的一种改进
comment: 4 pages
comments: 4 pages
abstract: A comparative study of different block matching alternatives for motion estimation is presented. The study is focused on computational burden and objective measures on the accuracy of prediction. Together with existing algorithms several new variations have been tested. An interesting modification of the conjugate direction method previously related in literature is reported. This new algorithm shows a good trade-off between computational complexity and accuracy of motion vector estimation. Computational complexity is evaluated using a sequence of artificial images designed to incorporate a great variety of motion vectors. The performance of block matching methods has been measured in terms of the entropy in the error signal between the motion compensated and the original frames.
summary: A comparative study of different block matching alternatives for motion estimation is presented. The study is focused on computational burden and objective measures on the accuracy of prediction. Together with existing algorithms several new variations have been tested. An interesting modification of the conjugate direction method previously related in literature is reported. This new algorithm shows a good trade-off between computational complexity and accuracy of motion vector estimation. Computational complexity is evaluated using a sequence of artificial images designed to incorporate a great variety of motion vectors. The performance of block matching methods has been measured in terms of the entropy in the error signal between the motion compensated and the original frames.
abstract_zh: 提出了用于运动估计的不同块匹配替代方案的比较研究。该研究的重点是计算负担和预测准确性的客观衡量标准。与现有算法一起测试了几种新的变体。报道了先前文献中相关的共轭方向方法的有趣修改。这种新算法在计算复杂性和运动矢量估计的准确性之间显示出良好的权衡。使用一系列旨在合并多种运动矢量的人造图像来评估计算复杂性。块匹配方法的性能是根据运动补偿帧和原始帧之间的误差信号的熵来测量的。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究改进共轭方向法在运动估计中的应用，旨在平衡计算复杂度和估计精度。
AI.motivation: 现有运动估计方法在计算复杂度和准确性之间难以平衡，需寻找更优的折中方案。
AI.method: 通过比较多种块匹配算法，测试新变体，特别是改进的共轭方向法，利用人工图像评估计算复杂度，用误差信号熵衡量性能。
AI.result: 改进的共轭方向法在计算复杂度和运动矢量估计精度间达到良好平衡，性能优于其他方法。
AI.conclusion: 改进的共轭方向法有效平衡了计算复杂度和准确性，为运动估计提供了新思路。

search_text: A modification of the conjugate direction method for motion estimation 运动估计共轭方向法的一种改进 A comparative study of different block matching alternatives for motion estimation is presented. The study is focused on computational burden and objective measures on the accuracy of prediction. Together with existing algorithms several new variations have been tested. An interesting modification of the conjugate direction method previously related in literature is reported. This new algorithm shows a good trade-off between computational complexity and accuracy of motion vector estimation. Computational complexity is evaluated using a sequence of artificial images designed to incorporate a great variety of motion vectors. The performance of block matching methods has been measured in terms of the entropy in the error signal between the motion compensated and the original frames. 提出了用于运动估计的不同块匹配替代方案的比较研究。该研究的重点是计算负担和预测准确性的客观衡量标准。与现有算法一起测试了几种新的变体。报道了先前文献中相关的共轭方向方法的有趣修改。这种新算法在计算复杂性和运动矢量估计的准确性之间显示出良好的权衡。使用一系列旨在合并多种运动矢量的人造图像来评估计算复杂性。块匹配方法的性能是根据运动补偿帧和原始帧之间的误差信号的熵来测量的。 本文主要研究改进共轭方向法在运动估计中的应用，旨在平衡计算复杂度和估计精度。 Marcos Faundez-Zanuy,Francesc Tarres-Ruiz cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Ali Shahin Shamsabadi,Brij Mohan Lal Srivastava,Aurélien Bellet,Nathalie Vauquier,Emmanuel Vincent,Mohamed Maouche,Marc Tommasi,Nicolas Papernot
title: Differentially Private Speaker Anonymization
title_zh: 差异化私人说话人匿名化
abstract: Sharing real-world speech utterances is key to the training and deployment of voice-based services. However, it also raises privacy risks as speech contains a wealth of personal data. Speaker anonymization aims to remove speaker information from a speech utterance while leaving its linguistic and prosodic attributes intact. State-of-the-art techniques operate by disentangling the speaker information (represented via a speaker embedding) from these attributes and re-synthesizing speech based on the speaker embedding of another speaker. Prior research in the privacy community has shown that anonymization often provides brittle privacy protection, even less so any provable guarantee. In this work, we show that disentanglement is indeed not perfect: linguistic and prosodic attributes still contain speaker information. We remove speaker information from these attributes by introducing differentially private feature extractors based on an autoencoder and an automatic speech recognizer, respectively, trained using noise layers. We plug these extractors in the state-of-the-art anonymization pipeline and generate, for the first time, private speech utterances with a provable upper bound on the speaker information they contain. We evaluate empirically the privacy and utility resulting from our differentially private speaker anonymization approach on the LibriSpeech data set. Experimental results show that the generated utterances retain very high utility for automatic speech recognition training and inference, while being much better protected against strong adversaries who leverage the full knowledge of the anonymization process to try to infer the speaker identity.
summary: Sharing real-world speech utterances is key to the training and deployment of voice-based services. However, it also raises privacy risks as speech contains a wealth of personal data. Speaker anonymization aims to remove speaker information from a speech utterance while leaving its linguistic and prosodic attributes intact. State-of-the-art techniques operate by disentangling the speaker information (represented via a speaker embedding) from these attributes and re-synthesizing speech based on the speaker embedding of another speaker. Prior research in the privacy community has shown that anonymization often provides brittle privacy protection, even less so any provable guarantee. In this work, we show that disentanglement is indeed not perfect: linguistic and prosodic attributes still contain speaker information. We remove speaker information from these attributes by introducing differentially private feature extractors based on an autoencoder and an automatic speech recognizer, respectively, trained using noise layers. We plug these extractors in the state-of-the-art anonymization pipeline and generate, for the first time, private speech utterances with a provable upper bound on the speaker information they contain. We evaluate empirically the privacy and utility resulting from our differentially private speaker anonymization approach on the LibriSpeech data set. Experimental results show that the generated utterances retain very high utility for automatic speech recognition training and inference, while being much better protected against strong adversaries who leverage the full knowledge of the anonymization process to try to infer the speaker identity.
abstract_zh: 共享真实世界的语音是训练和部署基于语音的服务的关键。然而，由于语音包含大量个人数据，这也带来了隐私风险。说话人匿名化旨在从语音话语中删除说话人信息，同时保持其语言和韵律属性完好无损。最先进的技术通过将说话者信息（通过说话者嵌入表示）与这些属性分离并根据另一个说话者的说话者嵌入重新合成语音来进行操作。隐私界的先前研究表明，匿名化通常提供脆弱的隐私保护，更不用说任何可证明的保证。在这项工作中，我们表明解开确实并不完美：语言和韵律属性仍然包含说话者信息。我们通过引入分别基于自动编码器和自动语音识别器的差分隐私特征提取器，并使用噪声层进行训练，从这些属性中删除说话者信息。我们将这些提取器插入最先进的匿名化管道中，并首次生成私人语音，其所包含的说话者信息具有可证明的上限。我们根据经验评估了 LibriSpeech 数据集上的差异隐私说话人匿名化方法所产生的隐私和实用性。实验结果表明，生成的话语对于自动语音识别训练和推理保留了非常高的实用性，同时可以更好地抵御利用匿名化过程的全部知识来尝试推断说话者身份的强大对手。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于差分隐私的说话人匿名化方法，通过引入差分隐私特征提取器，在保留语音语言和韵律属性的同时，提供可证明的隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 现有说话人匿名化技术无法提供可证明的隐私保障，且语言和韵律属性中仍可能残留说话人信息，存在隐私泄露风险。
AI.method: 基于自编码器和自动语音识别器设计差分隐私特征提取器，通过添加噪声层训练模型，并将其嵌入现有匿名化流程生成隐私保护语音。
AI.result: 在LibriSpeech数据集上验证表明，生成语音在保持高自动语音识别准确率的同时，显著提升了对抗强攻击者的隐私防护能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次实现具有可证明隐私上界的说话人匿名化，在保障语音数据实用价值的同时有效抵御隐私泄露风险。

title: Consistent Dropout for Policy Gradient Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 策略梯度强化学习的一致 Dropout
abstract: Dropout has long been a staple of supervised learning, but is rarely used in reinforcement learning. We analyze why naive application of dropout is problematic for policy-gradient learning algorithms and introduce consistent dropout, a simple technique to address this instability. We demonstrate consistent dropout enables stable training with A2C and PPO in both continuous and discrete action environments across a wide range of dropout probabilities. Finally, we show that consistent dropout enables the online training of complex architectures such as GPT without needing to disable the model's native dropout.
summary: Dropout has long been a staple of supervised learning, but is rarely used in reinforcement learning. We analyze why naive application of dropout is problematic for policy-gradient learning algorithms and introduce consistent dropout, a simple technique to address this instability. We demonstrate consistent dropout enables stable training with A2C and PPO in both continuous and discrete action environments across a wide range of dropout probabilities. Finally, we show that consistent dropout enables the online training of complex architectures such as GPT without needing to disable the model's native dropout.
abstract_zh: Dropout 长期以来一直是监督学习的主要内容，但很少用于强化学习。我们分析了为什么简单地应用 dropout 对于策略梯度学习算法来说是有问题的，并引入了一致的 dropout，这是一种解决这种不稳定性的简单技术。我们证明，一致的 dropout 可以在广泛的 dropout 概率范围内，在连续和离散的动作环境中使用 A2C 和 PPO 进行稳定的训练。最后，我们证明一致的 dropout 可以实现复杂架构（例如 GPT）的在线训练，而无需禁用模型的本机 dropout。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'一致Dropout'的技术，用于解决策略梯度强化学习中传统Dropout方法导致的训练不稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统Dropout在监督学习中广泛应用，但在强化学习的策略梯度方法中容易引发训练不稳定，需要新的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过引入'一致Dropout'技术，在策略梯度训练过程中保持Dropout掩码的一致性，避免因随机性导致的策略波动。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在A2C和PPO算法中实现了连续/离散动作空间的稳定训练，并成功应用于GPT等复杂模型的在线训练。
AI.conclusion: 一致Dropout有效解决了强化学习中Dropout的稳定性问题，为复杂神经网络架构的训练提供了新思路。
