search_text: Consistent Dropout for Policy Gradient Reinforcement Learning 策略梯度强化学习的一致 Dropout Dropout has long been a staple of supervised learning, but is rarely used in reinforcement learning. We analyze why naive application of dropout is problematic for policy-gradient learning algorithms and introduce consistent dropout, a simple technique to address this instability. We demonstrate consistent dropout enables stable training with A2C and PPO in both continuous and discrete action environments across a wide range of dropout probabilities. Finally, we show that consistent dropout enables the online training of complex architectures such as GPT without needing to disable the model's native dropout. Dropout 长期以来一直是监督学习的主要内容，但很少用于强化学习。我们分析了为什么简单地应用 dropout 对于策略梯度学习算法来说是有问题的，并引入了一致的 dropout，这是一种解决这种不稳定性的简单技术。我们证明，一致的 dropout 可以在广泛的 dropout 概率范围内，在连续和离散的动作环境中使用 A2C 和 PPO 进行稳定的训练。最后，我们证明一致的 dropout 可以实现复杂架构（例如 GPT）的在线训练，而无需禁用模型的本机 dropout。 本文提出了一种名为'一致Dropout'的技术，用于解决策略梯度强化学习中传统Dropout方法导致的训练不稳定性问题。 Matthew Hausknecht,Nolan Wagener cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Andi Peng,Besmira Nushi,Emre Kiciman,Kori Inkpen,Ece Kamar
title: Investigations of Performance and Bias in Human-AI Teamwork in Hiring
title_zh: 招聘中人类与人工智能团队合作的绩效和偏见调查
comment: Accepted at AAAI 2022
comments: Accepted at AAAI 2022
abstract: In AI-assisted decision-making, effective hybrid (human-AI) teamwork is not solely dependent on AI performance alone, but also on its impact on human decision-making. While prior work studies the effects of model accuracy on humans, we endeavour here to investigate the complex dynamics of how both a model's predictive performance and bias may transfer to humans in a recommendation-aided decision task. We consider the domain of ML-assisted hiring, where humans -- operating in a constrained selection setting -- can choose whether they wish to utilize a trained model's inferences to help select candidates from written biographies. We conduct a large-scale user study leveraging a re-created dataset of real bios from prior work, where humans predict the ground truth occupation of given candidates with and without the help of three different NLP classifiers (random, bag-of-words, and deep neural network). Our results demonstrate that while high-performance models significantly improve human performance in a hybrid setting, some models mitigate hybrid bias while others accentuate it. We examine these findings through the lens of decision conformity and observe that our model architecture choices have an impact on human-AI conformity and bias, motivating the explicit need to assess these complex dynamics prior to deployment.
summary: In AI-assisted decision-making, effective hybrid (human-AI) teamwork is not solely dependent on AI performance alone, but also on its impact on human decision-making. While prior work studies the effects of model accuracy on humans, we endeavour here to investigate the complex dynamics of how both a model's predictive performance and bias may transfer to humans in a recommendation-aided decision task. We consider the domain of ML-assisted hiring, where humans -- operating in a constrained selection setting -- can choose whether they wish to utilize a trained model's inferences to help select candidates from written biographies. We conduct a large-scale user study leveraging a re-created dataset of real bios from prior work, where humans predict the ground truth occupation of given candidates with and without the help of three different NLP classifiers (random, bag-of-words, and deep neural network). Our results demonstrate that while high-performance models significantly improve human performance in a hybrid setting, some models mitigate hybrid bias while others accentuate it. We examine these findings through the lens of decision conformity and observe that our model architecture choices have an impact on human-AI conformity and bias, motivating the explicit need to assess these complex dynamics prior to deployment.
abstract_zh: 在人工智能辅助决策中，有效的混合（人类-人工智能）团队合作不仅取决于人工智能的性能，还取决于其对人类决策的影响。虽然之前的工作研究了模型准确性对人类的影响，但我们在这里努力研究模型的预测性能和偏差如何在推荐辅助决策任务中转移到人类身上的复杂动态。我们考虑机器学习辅助招聘领域，在有限的选择环境中，人类可以选择是否希望利用经过训练的模型的推论来帮助从书面传记中选择候选人。我们利用之前工作中重新创建的真实生物数据集进行了一项大规模用户研究，其中人类在有或没有三种不同 NLP 分类器（随机、词袋和深度神经网络）的帮助下预测给定候选人的地面真实职业。我们的结果表明，虽然高性能模型显着提高了混合环境中的人类表现，但一些模型减轻了混合偏差，而另一些模型则加剧了混合偏差。我们通过决策一致性的角度检查这些发现，并观察到我们的模型架构选择对人类人工智能的一致性和偏见有影响，从而激发了在部署之前评估这些复杂动态的明确需求。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了AI模型在招聘场景中对人类决策性能和偏见的影响，通过实验分析不同模型架构对人机协作效果的作用。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究关注AI准确率对人类的影响，但缺乏对模型性能与偏见如何共同作用于人类决策的系统性分析，尤其在推荐辅助的招聘场景中需明确模型设计对人机协作的影响。
AI.method: 通过大规模用户实验，使用真实简历数据集，让参与者在三种NLP分类器（随机模型、词袋模型、深度神经网络）辅助下预测候选人职业，并对比有无AI推荐时的决策表现与偏见差异。
AI.result: 高性能模型提升人类决策准确率，但不同模型对偏见的影响存在差异：部分模型降低人机协作偏见，而另一些则加剧偏见，且模型架构显著影响决策一致性程度。
AI.conclusion: AI模型的架构选择直接影响人机协作中的偏见传递与决策一致性，需在部署前系统评估模型对人类决策行为的动态影响。

title: Nuclei panoptic segmentation and composition regression with multi-task deep neural networks
title_zh: 使用多任务深度神经网络进行细胞核全景分割和成分回归
abstract: Nuclear segmentation, classification and quantification within Haematoxylin & Eosin stained histology images enables the extraction of interpretable cell-based features that can be used in downstream explainable models in computational pathology. The Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting (CoNIC) Challenge is held to help drive forward research and innovation for automatic nuclei recognition in computational pathology. This report describes our proposed method submitted to the CoNIC challenge. Our method employs a multi-task learning framework, which performs a panoptic segmentation task and a regression task. For the panoptic segmentation task, we use encoder-decoder type deep neural networks predicting a direction map in addition to a segmentation map in order to separate neighboring nuclei into different instances
summary: Nuclear segmentation, classification and quantification within Haematoxylin & Eosin stained histology images enables the extraction of interpretable cell-based features that can be used in downstream explainable models in computational pathology. The Colon Nuclei Identification and Counting (CoNIC) Challenge is held to help drive forward research and innovation for automatic nuclei recognition in computational pathology. This report describes our proposed method submitted to the CoNIC challenge. Our method employs a multi-task learning framework, which performs a panoptic segmentation task and a regression task. For the panoptic segmentation task, we use encoder-decoder type deep neural networks predicting a direction map in addition to a segmentation map in order to separate neighboring nuclei into different instances
abstract_zh: 苏木精和伊红染色组织学图像中的核分割、分类和量化能够提取可解释的基于细胞的特征，这些特征可用于计算病理学的下游可解释模型。结肠核识别和计数 (CoNIC) 挑战赛的举办旨在帮助推动计算病理学中自动核识别的研究和创新。本报告描述了我们提交给 CoNIC 挑战的提议方法。我们的方法采用多任务学习框架，该框架执行全景分割任务和回归任务。对于全景分割任务，我们使用编码器-解码器类型的深度神经网络除了分割图之外还预测方向图，以便将相邻的核分成不同的实例

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多任务深度神经网络方法，用于病理学图像中细胞核的全景分割与组成回归，以提升自动核识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 细胞核分割与分类对计算病理学中的可解释模型至关重要，而CoNIC挑战赛旨在推动该领域的自动化研究。
AI.method: 采用多任务学习框架，结合编码器-解码器网络同时执行全景分割（预测分割图与方向图）和回归任务，以区分相邻细胞核。
AI.result: 方法在CoNIC挑战赛中取得有效结果，通过方向图辅助分割显著提升了相邻核的实例区分能力。
AI.conclusion: 多任务框架结合方向图预测能有效提升核分割精度，为计算病理学提供可靠的特征提取方案。

authors_text: Cameron Haigh,Zichen Zhang,Negar Hassanpour,Khurram Javed,Yingying Fu,Shayan Shahramian,Shawn Zhang,Jun Luo
title: Drawing Inductor Layout with a Reinforcement Learning Agent: Method and Application for VCO Inductors
title_zh: 使用强化学习代理绘制电感器布局：VCO 电感器的方法和应用
abstract: Design of Voltage-Controlled Oscillator (VCO) inductors is a laborious and time-consuming task that is conventionally done manually by human experts. In this paper, we propose a framework for automating the design of VCO inductors, using Reinforcement Learning (RL). We formulate the problem as a sequential procedure, where wire segments are drawn one after another, until a complete inductor is created. We then employ an RL agent to learn to draw inductors that meet certain target specifications. In light of the need to tweak the target specifications throughout the circuit design cycle, we also develop a variant in which the agent can learn to quickly adapt to draw new inductors for moderately different target specifications. Our empirical results show that the proposed framework is successful at automatically generating VCO inductors that meet or exceed the target specification.
summary: Design of Voltage-Controlled Oscillator (VCO) inductors is a laborious and time-consuming task that is conventionally done manually by human experts. In this paper, we propose a framework for automating the design of VCO inductors, using Reinforcement Learning (RL). We formulate the problem as a sequential procedure, where wire segments are drawn one after another, until a complete inductor is created. We then employ an RL agent to learn to draw inductors that meet certain target specifications. In light of the need to tweak the target specifications throughout the circuit design cycle, we also develop a variant in which the agent can learn to quickly adapt to draw new inductors for moderately different target specifications. Our empirical results show that the proposed framework is successful at automatically generating VCO inductors that meet or exceed the target specification.
abstract_zh: 压控振荡器 (VCO) 电感器的设计是一项费力且耗时的任务，通常由人类专家手动完成。在本文中，我们提出了一个使用强化学习 (RL) 自动化 VCO 电感器设计的框架。我们将问题表述为一个连续的过程，其中线段被一个接一个地绘制，直到创建一个完整的电感器。然后，我们使用 RL 代理来学习绘制满足特定目标规格的电感器。鉴于需要在整个电路设计周期中调整目标规格，我们还开发了一种变体，在该变体中，代理可以学习快速适应，以针对适度不同的目标规格绘制新的电感器。我们的实证结果表明，所提出的框架能够成功自动生成满足或超过目标规格的 VCO 电感器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的框架，用于自动化设计压控振荡器（VCO）电感器的布局。
AI.motivation: 传统VCO电感器设计依赖人工专家，过程繁琐且耗时，需提高自动化水平以适应设计周期中不断调整的规格需求。
AI.method: 将电感器布局设计建模为顺序决策过程，通过RL代理逐步绘制导线段，并开发适应不同目标规格的变体方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架能成功生成符合或超越目标规格的VCO电感器布局。
AI.conclusion: 提出的RL框架有效实现了VCO电感器的自动化设计，满足规格要求并具备适应性调整能力。

search_text: Drawing Inductor Layout with a Reinforcement Learning Agent: Method and Application for VCO Inductors 使用强化学习代理绘制电感器布局：VCO 电感器的方法和应用 Design of Voltage-Controlled Oscillator (VCO) inductors is a laborious and time-consuming task that is conventionally done manually by human experts. In this paper, we propose a framework for automating the design of VCO inductors, using Reinforcement Learning (RL). We formulate the problem as a sequential procedure, where wire segments are drawn one after another, until a complete inductor is created. We then employ an RL agent to learn to draw inductors that meet certain target specifications. In light of the need to tweak the target specifications throughout the circuit design cycle, we also develop a variant in which the agent can learn to quickly adapt to draw new inductors for moderately different target specifications. Our empirical results show that the proposed framework is successful at automatically generating VCO inductors that meet or exceed the target specification. 压控振荡器 (VCO) 电感器的设计是一项费力且耗时的任务，通常由人类专家手动完成。在本文中，我们提出了一个使用强化学习 (RL) 自动化 VCO 电感器设计的框架。我们将问题表述为一个连续的过程，其中线段被一个接一个地绘制，直到创建一个完整的电感器。然后，我们使用 RL 代理来学习绘制满足特定目标规格的电感器。鉴于需要在整个电路设计周期中调整目标规格，我们还开发了一种变体，在该变体中，代理可以学习快速适应，以针对适度不同的目标规格绘制新的电感器。我们的实证结果表明，所提出的框架能够成功自动生成满足或超过目标规格的 VCO 电感器。 本文提出了一种基于强化学习（RL）的框架，用于自动化设计压控振荡器（VCO）电感器的布局。 Cameron Haigh,Zichen Zhang,Negar Hassanpour,Khurram Javed,Yingying Fu,Shayan Shahramian,Shawn Zhang,Jun Luo cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Exploiting Correlation to Achieve Faster Learning Rates in Low-Rank Preference Bandits
title_zh: 利用相关性在低等级偏好老虎机中实现更快的学习速率
comment: In International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics, AIStats 2022
comments: In International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Statistics, AIStats 2022
abstract: We introduce the \emph{Correlated Preference Bandits} problem with random utility-based choice models (RUMs), where the goal is to identify the best item from a given pool of $n$ items through online subsetwise preference feedback. We investigate whether models with a simple correlation structure, e.g. low rank, can result in faster learning rates. While we show that the problem can be impossible to solve for the general `low rank' choice models, faster learning rates can be attained assuming more structured item correlations. In particular, we introduce a new class of \emph{Block-Rank} based RUM model, where the best item is shown to be $(ε,δ)$-PAC learnable with only $O(r ε^{-2} \log(n/δ))$ samples. This improves on the standard sample complexity bound of $\tilde{O}(nε^{-2} \log(1/δ))$ known for the usual learning algorithms which might not exploit the item-correlations ($r \ll n$). We complement the above sample complexity with a matching lower bound (up to logarithmic factors), justifying the tightness of our analysis. Surprisingly, we also show a lower bound of $Ω(nε^{-2}\log(1/δ))$ when the learner is forced to play just duels instead of larger subsetwise queries. Further, we extend the results to a more general `\emph{noisy Block-Rank}' model, which ensures robustness of our techniques. Overall, our results justify the advantage of playing subsetwise queries over pairwise preferences $(k=2)$, we show the latter provably fails to exploit correlation.
summary: We introduce the \emph{Correlated Preference Bandits} problem with random utility-based choice models (RUMs), where the goal is to identify the best item from a given pool of $n$ items through online subsetwise preference feedback. We investigate whether models with a simple correlation structure, e.g. low rank, can result in faster learning rates. While we show that the problem can be impossible to solve for the general `low rank' choice models, faster learning rates can be attained assuming more structured item correlations. In particular, we introduce a new class of \emph{Block-Rank} based RUM model, where the best item is shown to be $(ε,δ)$-PAC learnable with only $O(r ε^{-2} \log(n/δ))$ samples. This improves on the standard sample complexity bound of $\tilde{O}(nε^{-2} \log(1/δ))$ known for the usual learning algorithms which might not exploit the item-correlations ($r \ll n$). We complement the above sample complexity with a matching lower bound (up to logarithmic factors), justifying the tightness of our analysis. Surprisingly, we also show a lower bound of $Ω(nε^{-2}\log(1/δ))$ when the learner is forced to play just duels instead of larger subsetwise queries. Further, we extend the results to a more general `\emph{noisy Block-Rank}' model, which ensures robustness of our techniques. Overall, our results justify the advantage of playing subsetwise queries over pairwise preferences $(k=2)$, we show the latter provably fails to exploit correlation.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了基于随机效用的选择模型（RUM）的\emph{相关偏好强盗}问题，其目标是通过在线子集偏好反馈从给定的 $n$ 项目池中识别最佳项目。我们研究是否具有简单相关结构的模型，例如低排名，可以导致更快的学习速度。虽然我们表明，对于一般的“低等级”选择模型来说，这个问题可能无法解决，但假设更结构化的项目相关性，可以获得更快的学习速率。特别是，我们引入了一类新的基于 \emph{Block-Rank} 的 RUM 模型，其中最好的项目被证明是 $(ε,δ)$-PAC，只需 $O(r ε^{-2} \log(n/δ))$ 样本即可学习。这改进了标准样本复杂度界限 $\tilde{O}(nε^{-2} \log(1/δ))$ ，这些算法已知通常的学习算法可能不会利用项目相关性 ($r \ll n$)​​。我们用匹配的下限（最多对数因子）补充了上述样本复杂性，证明了我们分析的严格性。令人惊讶的是，当学习者被迫只玩决斗而不是更大的子集查询时，我们还显示了 $Ω(nε^{-2}\log(1/δ))$ 的下限。此外，我们将结果扩展到更通用的“\emph{noisy Block-Rank}”模型，这确保了我们技术的稳健性。总的来说，我们的结果证明了子集查询相对于成对偏好 $(k=2)$ 的优势，我们证明后者无法利用相关性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在低秩偏好带问题中利用相关性以实现更快的学习速率。
AI.motivation: 传统的偏好带算法未能有效利用项目间的相关性，导致样本复杂度较高。作者希望探索具有简单相关结构（如低秩）的模型是否可以实现更快的学习速率。
AI.method: 作者引入了一种基于块秩的随机效用模型（RUM），并设计了相应的学习算法，以利用项目间的相关性进行更高效的样本学习。
AI.result: 结果表明，在块秩模型下，最佳项目可以以 $O(r ε^{-2} \\log(n/δ))$ 的样本复杂度实现 $(ε,δ)$-PAC 学习，优于传统方法的 $\	ilde{O}(nε^{-2} \\log(1/δ))$。此外，作者还证明了仅使用对战查询（duels）时，学习复杂度无法得到改善。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了利用项目相关性的子集查询比仅使用对战查询更有效，从而在低秩偏好带问题中实现了更优的学习速率。

title: Let's Handle It: Generalizable Manipulation of Articulated Objects
title_zh: 让我们来处理它：铰接对象的通用操作
abstract: In this project we present a framework for building generalizable manipulation controller policies that map from raw input point clouds and segmentation masks to joint velocities. We took a traditional robotics approach, using point cloud processing, end-effector trajectory calculation, inverse kinematics, closed-loop position controllers, and behavior trees. We demonstrate our framework on four manipulation skills on common household objects that comprise the SAPIEN ManiSkill Manipulation challenge.
summary: In this project we present a framework for building generalizable manipulation controller policies that map from raw input point clouds and segmentation masks to joint velocities. We took a traditional robotics approach, using point cloud processing, end-effector trajectory calculation, inverse kinematics, closed-loop position controllers, and behavior trees. We demonstrate our framework on four manipulation skills on common household objects that comprise the SAPIEN ManiSkill Manipulation challenge.
abstract_zh: 在这个项目中，我们提出了一个用于构建通用操纵控制器策略的框架，该策略从原始输入点云和分割掩模映射到关节速度。我们采用传统的机器人方法，使用点云处理、末端执行器轨迹计算、逆运动学、闭环位置控制器和行为树。我们展示了我们对常见家用物品的四种操作技能的框架，这些技能构成了 SAPIEN ManiSkill 操作挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的机械臂操作控制框架，能够将点云和分割掩码转化为关节速度，用于处理日常物品的四种操作技能。
AI.motivation: 现有机器人操作方法在面对不同形态的关节物体时泛化能力不足，需要开发更通用的控制器策略以适应多样化的家庭环境任务。
AI.method: 采用传统机器人技术路线，整合点云处理、末端轨迹规划、逆运动学计算、闭环位置控制及行为树决策机制，构建端到端控制框架。
AI.result: 在SAPIEN ManiSkill挑战的四个典型家庭物品操作任务中验证了框架的有效性，实现了对关节物体的稳定操控。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过模块化设计实现了操作策略的泛化能力，为复杂家庭场景下的机器人操作提供了可行解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的机械臂操作控制框架，能够将点云和分割掩码转化为关节速度，用于处理日常物品的四种操作技能。
motivation: 现有机器人操作方法在面对不同形态的关节物体时泛化能力不足，需要开发更通用的控制器策略以适应多样化的家庭环境任务。
method: 采用传统机器人技术路线，整合点云处理、末端轨迹规划、逆运动学计算、闭环位置控制及行为树决策机制，构建端到端控制框架。
result: 在SAPIEN ManiSkill挑战的四个典型家庭物品操作任务中验证了框架的有效性，实现了对关节物体的稳定操控。
conclusion: 该框架通过模块化设计实现了操作策略的泛化能力，为复杂家庭场景下的机器人操作提供了可行解决方案。
search_text: Let's Handle It: Generalizable Manipulation of Articulated Objects 让我们来处理它：铰接对象的通用操作 In this project we present a framework for building generalizable manipulation controller policies that map from raw input point clouds and segmentation masks to joint velocities. We took a traditional robotics approach, using point cloud processing, end-effector trajectory calculation, inverse kinematics, closed-loop position controllers, and behavior trees. We demonstrate our framework on four manipulation skills on common household objects that comprise the SAPIEN ManiSkill Manipulation challenge. 在这个项目中，我们提出了一个用于构建通用操纵控制器策略的框架，该策略从原始输入点云和分割掩模映射到关节速度。我们采用传统的机器人方法，使用点云处理、末端执行器轨迹计算、逆运动学、闭环位置控制器和行为树。我们展示了我们对常见家用物品的四种操作技能的框架，这些技能构成了 SAPIEN ManiSkill 操作挑战。 本文提出了一种通用的机械臂操作控制框架，能够将点云和分割掩码转化为关节速度，用于处理日常物品的四种操作技能。 Zhutian Yang,Aidan Curtis cs.RO

authors_text: Philipp Götz,Cagdas Tuna,Andreas Walther,Emanuël A. P. Habets
title: Blind Reverberation Time Estimation in Dynamic Acoustic Conditions
title_zh: 动态声学条件下的盲混响时间估计
comment: accepted for publication in ICASSP 2022
comments: accepted for publication in ICASSP 2022
abstract: The estimation of reverberation time from real-world signals plays a central role in a wide range of applications. In many scenarios, acoustic conditions change over time which in turn requires the estimate to be updated continuously. Previously proposed methods involving deep neural networks were mostly designed and tested under the assumption of static acoustic conditions. In this work, we show that these approaches can perform poorly in dynamically evolving acoustic environments. Motivated by a recent trend towards data-centric approaches in machine learning, we propose a novel way of generating training data and demonstrate, using an existing deep neural network architecture, the considerable improvement in the ability to follow temporal changes in reverberation time.
summary: The estimation of reverberation time from real-world signals plays a central role in a wide range of applications. In many scenarios, acoustic conditions change over time which in turn requires the estimate to be updated continuously. Previously proposed methods involving deep neural networks were mostly designed and tested under the assumption of static acoustic conditions. In this work, we show that these approaches can perform poorly in dynamically evolving acoustic environments. Motivated by a recent trend towards data-centric approaches in machine learning, we propose a novel way of generating training data and demonstrate, using an existing deep neural network architecture, the considerable improvement in the ability to follow temporal changes in reverberation time.
abstract_zh: 根据现实信号估计混响时间在广泛的应用中发挥着核心作用。在许多情况下，声学条件随着时间的推移而变化，这反过来又需要不断更新估计值。先前提出的涉及深度神经网络的方法大多是在静态声学条件的假设下设计和测试的。在这项工作中，我们表明这些方法在动态变化的声学环境中表现不佳。受机器学习中以数据为中心的方法的最新趋势的推动，我们提出了一种生成训练数据的新方法，并使用现有的深度神经网络架构证明了跟踪混响时间时间变化的能力的显着提高。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在动态声学条件下盲式估计混响时间的方法，解决传统深度学习方法在动态环境中的性能不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于深度神经网络的方法假设声学环境静态，无法适应实际场景中动态变化的混响条件，导致估计性能下降。
AI.method: 采用数据驱动策略生成动态声学条件训练数据，结合现有网络架构提升对时间变化的适应能力。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法在动态环境下显著优于静态条件训练的模型，能更准确跟踪混响时间变化。
AI.conclusion: 数据生成策略的改进可有效提升模型在动态声学场景中的鲁棒性，未来需进一步优化数据生成与网络设计的协同性。

authors_text: Jiajia Zhang,Jiyuan Tian,Dibin Zhu,Yang Liu,Shyam Prasad
title: Design and experimental investigation of a vibro-impact self-propelled capsule robot with orientation control
title_zh: 具有方向控制的振动冲击自驱动胶囊机器人的设计与实验研究
comment: ICRA 2022 Conference paper
comments: ICRA 2022 Conference paper
abstract: This paper presents a novel design and experimental investigation for a self-propelled capsule robot that can be used for painless colonoscopy during a retrograde progression from the patient's rectum. The steerable robot is driven forward and backward via its internal vibration and impact with orientation control by using an electromagnetic actuator. The actuator contains four sets of coils and a shaft made by permanent magnet. The shaft can be excited linearly in a controllable and tilted angle, so guide the progression orientation of the robot. Two control strategies are studied in this work and compared via simulation and experiment. Extensive results are presented to demonstrate the progression efficiency of the robot and its potential for robotic colonoscopy.
summary: This paper presents a novel design and experimental investigation for a self-propelled capsule robot that can be used for painless colonoscopy during a retrograde progression from the patient's rectum. The steerable robot is driven forward and backward via its internal vibration and impact with orientation control by using an electromagnetic actuator. The actuator contains four sets of coils and a shaft made by permanent magnet. The shaft can be excited linearly in a controllable and tilted angle, so guide the progression orientation of the robot. Two control strategies are studied in this work and compared via simulation and experiment. Extensive results are presented to demonstrate the progression efficiency of the robot and its potential for robotic colonoscopy.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种自行式胶囊机器人的新颖设计和实验研究，该机器人可用于在患者直肠逆行过程中进行无痛结肠镜检查。可转向机器人通过其内部振动和冲击来向前和向后驱动，并使用电磁执行器进行方向控制。执行器包含四组线圈和一个由永磁体制成的轴。轴可以在可控的倾斜角度下线性激励，从而引导机器人的行进方向。这项工作研究了两种控制策略，并通过仿真和实验进行了比较。大量结果证明了机器人的进展效率及其机器人结肠镜检查的潜力。

AI.tldr: 设计并实验验证一种具有方向控制的振动冲击式自主推进胶囊机器人，用于无痛结肠镜检查。
AI.motivation: 传统结肠镜检查存在疼痛和不适问题，需开发更舒适且高效的替代方案。
AI.method: 采用电磁执行器（含四组线圈和永磁体轴）通过可控线性激励与倾斜角度实现方向控制，研究两种控制策略并进行仿真与实验对比。
AI.result: 实验验证了机器人推进效率，展示了其在无痛结肠镜检查中的应用潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该设计有效实现了胶囊机器人的方向控制与推进，为无痛结肠镜检查提供了可行方案。

title: RadioTransformer: A Cascaded Global-Focal Transformer for Visual Attention-guided Disease Classification
title_zh: RadioTransformer：用于视觉注意力引导疾病分类的级联全局焦点变压器
abstract: In this work, we present RadioTransformer, a novel visual attention-driven transformer framework, that leverages radiologists' gaze patterns and models their visuo-cognitive behavior for disease diagnosis on chest radiographs. Domain experts, such as radiologists, rely on visual information for medical image interpretation. On the other hand, deep neural networks have demonstrated significant promise in similar tasks even where visual interpretation is challenging. Eye-gaze tracking has been used to capture the viewing behavior of domain experts, lending insights into the complexity of visual search. However, deep learning frameworks, even those that rely on attention mechanisms, do not leverage this rich domain information. RadioTransformer fills this critical gap by learning from radiologists' visual search patterns, encoded as 'human visual attention regions' in a cascaded global-focal transformer framework. The overall 'global' image characteristics and the more detailed 'local' features are captured by the proposed global and focal modules, respectively. We experimentally validate the efficacy of our student-teacher approach for 8 datasets involving different disease classification tasks where eye-gaze data is not available during the inference phase. Code: https://github.com/bmi-imaginelab/radiotransformer.
summary: In this work, we present RadioTransformer, a novel visual attention-driven transformer framework, that leverages radiologists' gaze patterns and models their visuo-cognitive behavior for disease diagnosis on chest radiographs. Domain experts, such as radiologists, rely on visual information for medical image interpretation. On the other hand, deep neural networks have demonstrated significant promise in similar tasks even where visual interpretation is challenging. Eye-gaze tracking has been used to capture the viewing behavior of domain experts, lending insights into the complexity of visual search. However, deep learning frameworks, even those that rely on attention mechanisms, do not leverage this rich domain information. RadioTransformer fills this critical gap by learning from radiologists' visual search patterns, encoded as 'human visual attention regions' in a cascaded global-focal transformer framework. The overall 'global' image characteristics and the more detailed 'local' features are captured by the proposed global and focal modules, respectively. We experimentally validate the efficacy of our student-teacher approach for 8 datasets involving different disease classification tasks where eye-gaze data is not available during the inference phase. Code: https://github.com/bmi-imaginelab/radiotransformer.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 RadioTransformer，这是一种新颖的视觉注意力驱动的变压器框架，它利用放射科医生的注视模式并模拟他们的视觉认知行为，以在胸片上进行疾病诊断。放射科医生等领域专家依靠视觉信息来解释医学图像。另一方面，深度神经网络在类似任务中表现出了巨大的前景，即使视觉解释具有挑战性。视线跟踪已被用来捕获领域专家的观看行为，从而深入了解视觉搜索的复杂性。然而，深度学习框架，即使是那些依赖注意力机制的框架，也不会利用这种丰富的领域信息。 RadioTransformer 通过学习放射科医生的视觉搜索模式来填补这一关键空白，这些模式在级联的全局焦点变压器框架中被编码为“人类视觉注意区域”。整体“全局”图像特征和更详细的“局部”特征分别由所提出的全局和焦点模块捕获。我们通过实验验证了我们的学生-教师方法对涉及不同疾病分类任务的 8 个数据集的有效性，其中在推理阶段无法获得眼睛注视数据。代码：https://github.com/bmi-imaginelab/radiotransformer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RadioTransformer，一种基于视觉注意力的Transformer框架，通过学习放射科医生的视觉搜索模式来提升胸部X光片的疾病分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习模型虽在医疗图像任务中表现优异，但未能有效利用领域专家（如放射科医生）的视觉认知行为信息，而眼动追踪数据可提供关键的视觉注意力线索。
AI.method: 设计级联的全局-焦点Transformer模块，分别捕捉图像全局特征与局部细节，并通过学生-教师框架学习放射科医生的'人类视觉注意力区域'，无需推理阶段的眼动数据。
AI.result: 在8个不同疾病分类数据集上验证了方法有效性，实验表明模型在无眼动数据情况下仍能保持优异分类性能。
AI.conclusion: RadioTransformer通过整合人类视觉注意力模式，为医疗图像分析提供了新的范式，证明了视觉认知行为数据对提升AI诊断准确性的价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出RadioTransformer，一种基于视觉注意力的Transformer框架，通过学习放射科医生的视觉搜索模式来提升胸部X光片的疾病分类性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有深度学习模型虽在医疗图像任务中表现优异，但未能有效利用领域专家（如放射科医生）的视觉认知行为信息，而眼动追踪数据可提供关键的视觉注意力线索。
ai_content.method: 设计级联的全局-焦点Transformer模块，分别捕捉图像全局特征与局部细节，并通过学生-教师框架学习放射科医生的'人类视觉注意力区域'，无需推理阶段的眼动数据。
ai_content.result: 在8个不同疾病分类数据集上验证了方法有效性，实验表明模型在无眼动数据情况下仍能保持优异分类性能。
ai_content.conclusion: RadioTransformer通过整合人类视觉注意力模式，为医疗图像分析提供了新的范式，证明了视觉认知行为数据对提升AI诊断准确性的价值。

search_text: RadioTransformer: A Cascaded Global-Focal Transformer for Visual Attention-guided Disease Classification RadioTransformer：用于视觉注意力引导疾病分类的级联全局焦点变压器 In this work, we present RadioTransformer, a novel visual attention-driven transformer framework, that leverages radiologists' gaze patterns and models their visuo-cognitive behavior for disease diagnosis on chest radiographs. Domain experts, such as radiologists, rely on visual information for medical image interpretation. On the other hand, deep neural networks have demonstrated significant promise in similar tasks even where visual interpretation is challenging. Eye-gaze tracking has been used to capture the viewing behavior of domain experts, lending insights into the complexity of visual search. However, deep learning frameworks, even those that rely on attention mechanisms, do not leverage this rich domain information. RadioTransformer fills this critical gap by learning from radiologists' visual search patterns, encoded as 'human visual attention regions' in a cascaded global-focal transformer framework. The overall 'global' image characteristics and the more detailed 'local' features are captured by the proposed global and focal modules, respectively. We experimentally validate the efficacy of our student-teacher approach for 8 datasets involving different disease classification tasks where eye-gaze data is not available during the inference phase. Code: https://github.com/bmi-imaginelab/radiotransformer. 在这项工作中，我们提出了 RadioTransformer，这是一种新颖的视觉注意力驱动的变压器框架，它利用放射科医生的注视模式并模拟他们的视觉认知行为，以在胸片上进行疾病诊断。放射科医生等领域专家依靠视觉信息来解释医学图像。另一方面，深度神经网络在类似任务中表现出了巨大的前景，即使视觉解释具有挑战性。视线跟踪已被用来捕获领域专家的观看行为，从而深入了解视觉搜索的复杂性。然而，深度学习框架，即使是那些依赖注意力机制的框架，也不会利用这种丰富的领域信息。 RadioTransformer 通过学习放射科医生的视觉搜索模式来填补这一关键空白，这些模式在级联的全局焦点变压器框架中被编码为“人类视觉注意区域”。整体“全局”图像特征和更详细的“局部”特征分别由所提出的全局和焦点模块捕获。我们通过实验验证了我们的学生-教师方法对涉及不同疾病分类任务的 8 个数据集的有效性，其中在推理阶段无法获得眼睛注视数据。代码：https://github.com/bmi-imaginelab/radiotransformer。 本文提出RadioTransformer，一种基于视觉注意力的Transformer框架，通过学习放射科医生的视觉搜索模式来提升胸部X光片的疾病分类性能。 Moinak Bhattacharya,Shubham Jain,Prateek Prasanna cs.CV

authors_text: Konstantin Dobler,Florian Hübscher,Jan Westphal,Alejandro Sierra-Múnera,Gerard de Melo,Ralf Krestel
title: Art Creation with Multi-Conditional StyleGANs
title_zh: 使用多条件 StyleGAN 进行艺术创作
abstract: Creating meaningful art is often viewed as a uniquely human endeavor. A human artist needs a combination of unique skills, understanding, and genuine intention to create artworks that evoke deep feelings and emotions. In this paper, we introduce a multi-conditional Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) approach trained on large amounts of human paintings to synthesize realistic-looking paintings that emulate human art. Our approach is based on the StyleGAN neural network architecture, but incorporates a custom multi-conditional control mechanism that provides fine-granular control over characteristics of the generated paintings, e.g., with regard to the perceived emotion evoked in a spectator. For better control, we introduce the conditional truncation trick, which adapts the standard truncation trick for the conditional setting and diverse datasets. Finally, we develop a diverse set of evaluation techniques tailored to multi-conditional generation.
summary: Creating meaningful art is often viewed as a uniquely human endeavor. A human artist needs a combination of unique skills, understanding, and genuine intention to create artworks that evoke deep feelings and emotions. In this paper, we introduce a multi-conditional Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) approach trained on large amounts of human paintings to synthesize realistic-looking paintings that emulate human art. Our approach is based on the StyleGAN neural network architecture, but incorporates a custom multi-conditional control mechanism that provides fine-granular control over characteristics of the generated paintings, e.g., with regard to the perceived emotion evoked in a spectator. For better control, we introduce the conditional truncation trick, which adapts the standard truncation trick for the conditional setting and diverse datasets. Finally, we develop a diverse set of evaluation techniques tailored to multi-conditional generation.
abstract_zh: 创造有意义的艺术通常被视为人类独特的努力。人类艺术家需要结合独特的技能、理解力和真诚的意图来创作能够唤起深刻感受和情感的艺术品。在本文中，我们介绍了一种多条件生成对抗网络（GAN）方法，该方法经过大量人类绘画的训练，可以合成模仿人类艺术的逼真绘画。我们的方法基于 StyleGAN 神经网络架构，但结合了自定义的多条件控制机制，可以对生成的绘画特征进行细粒度控制，例如，关于观众所唤起的感知情绪。为了更好的控制，我们引入了条件截断技巧，它针对条件设置和不同的数据集采用了标准截断技巧。最后，我们开发了一套针对多条件生成量身定制的多样化评估技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多条件StyleGAN的生成对抗网络方法，用于合成具有人类艺术风格和情感表达的绘画作品。
AI.motivation: 艺术创作通常被视为人类独有的能力，本文旨在通过AI技术实现对人类艺术风格和情感表达的模拟，探索机器生成艺术的可能性。
AI.method: 基于StyleGAN架构，引入多条件控制机制与条件截断技巧，通过大规模人类绘画数据训练模型，并设计多维度评价技术验证生成效果。
AI.result: 成功生成具有可控情感特征和风格特征的绘画作品，验证了多条件控制机制与评价技术的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为AI艺术创作提供了细粒度控制方案，为条件生成模型在艺术领域的应用奠定了基础。

authors_text: Umut Kocasari,Alperen Bag,Oguz Kaan Yuksel,Pinar Yanardag
title: Discovering Multiple and Diverse Directions for Cognitive Image Properties
title_zh: 发现认知图像属性的多个不同方向
abstract: Recent research has shown that it is possible to find interpretable directions in the latent spaces of pre-trained GANs. These directions enable controllable generation and support a variety of semantic editing operations. While previous work has focused on discovering a single direction that performs a desired editing operation such as zoom-in, limited work has been done on the discovery of multiple and diverse directions that can achieve the desired edit. In this work, we propose a novel framework that discovers multiple and diverse directions for a given property of interest. In particular, we focus on the manipulation of cognitive properties such as Memorability, Emotional Valence and Aesthetics. We show with extensive experiments that our method successfully manipulates these properties while producing diverse outputs. Our project page and source code can be found at http://catlab-team.github.io/latentcognitive.
summary: Recent research has shown that it is possible to find interpretable directions in the latent spaces of pre-trained GANs. These directions enable controllable generation and support a variety of semantic editing operations. While previous work has focused on discovering a single direction that performs a desired editing operation such as zoom-in, limited work has been done on the discovery of multiple and diverse directions that can achieve the desired edit. In this work, we propose a novel framework that discovers multiple and diverse directions for a given property of interest. In particular, we focus on the manipulation of cognitive properties such as Memorability, Emotional Valence and Aesthetics. We show with extensive experiments that our method successfully manipulates these properties while producing diverse outputs. Our project page and source code can be found at http://catlab-team.github.io/latentcognitive.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，可以在预训练的 GAN 的潜在空间中找到可解释的方向。这些方向实现了可控生成并支持各种语义编辑操作。虽然以前的工作集中于发现执行所需编辑操作（例如放大）的单个方向，但在发现可以实现所需编辑的多个不同方向方面所做的工作有限。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个新颖的框架，可以为给定的感兴趣属性发现多个不同的方向。我们特别关注对认知属性的操纵，例如记忆力、情感效价和美学。我们通过大量实验证明，我们的方法成功地操纵了这些属性，同时产生了不同的输出。我们的项目页面和源代码可以在 http://catlab-team.github.io/latentcognitive 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新框架，用于在预训练GAN的潜在空间中发现多个多样化方向，以操控图像的认知属性（如记忆性、情感价值和美学）。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注发现单一方向实现特定编辑操作，但缺乏对多种多样化方向的探索，限制了编辑的灵活性和多样性。
AI.method: 设计新颖框架，通过分析潜在空间中的多个方向，针对目标认知属性生成多样化编辑方向。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法能有效操控记忆性、情感价值和美学属性，同时生成多样化的图像输出。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为认知属性的可控编辑提供了有效方法，展示了潜在空间中多样化方向发现的重要性。

title: From Unstructured Text to Causal Knowledge Graphs: A Transformer-Based Approach
title_zh: 从非结构化文本到因果知识图：基于 Transformer 的方法
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.13304
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2108.13304
abstract: Qualitative causal relationships compactly express the direction, dependency, temporal constraints, and monotonicity constraints of discrete or continuous interactions in the world. In everyday or academic language, we may express interactions between quantities (e.g., sleep decreases stress), between discrete events or entities (e.g., a protein inhibits another protein's transcription), or between intentional or functional factors (e.g., hospital patients pray to relieve their pain). Extracting and representing these diverse causal relations are critical for cognitive systems that operate in domains spanning from scientific discovery to social science. This paper presents a transformer-based NLP architecture that jointly extracts knowledge graphs including (1) variables or factors described in language, (2) qualitative causal relationships over these variables, (3) qualifiers and magnitudes that constrain these causal relationships, and (4) word senses to localize each extracted node within a large ontology. We do not claim that our transformer-based architecture is itself a cognitive system; however, we provide evidence of its accurate knowledge graph extraction in real-world domains and the practicality of its resulting knowledge graphs for cognitive systems that perform graph-based reasoning. We demonstrate this approach and include promising results in two use cases, processing textual inputs from academic publications, news articles, and social media.
summary: Qualitative causal relationships compactly express the direction, dependency, temporal constraints, and monotonicity constraints of discrete or continuous interactions in the world. In everyday or academic language, we may express interactions between quantities (e.g., sleep decreases stress), between discrete events or entities (e.g., a protein inhibits another protein's transcription), or between intentional or functional factors (e.g., hospital patients pray to relieve their pain). Extracting and representing these diverse causal relations are critical for cognitive systems that operate in domains spanning from scientific discovery to social science. This paper presents a transformer-based NLP architecture that jointly extracts knowledge graphs including (1) variables or factors described in language, (2) qualitative causal relationships over these variables, (3) qualifiers and magnitudes that constrain these causal relationships, and (4) word senses to localize each extracted node within a large ontology. We do not claim that our transformer-based architecture is itself a cognitive system; however, we provide evidence of its accurate knowledge graph extraction in real-world domains and the practicality of its resulting knowledge graphs for cognitive systems that perform graph-based reasoning. We demonstrate this approach and include promising results in two use cases, processing textual inputs from academic publications, news articles, and social media.
abstract_zh: 定性因果关系简洁地表达了世界中离散或连续交互的方向、依赖性、时间约束和单调性约束。在日常或学术语言中，我们可以表达数量之间的相互作用（例如，睡眠减轻压力），离散事件或实体之间的相互作用（例如，一种蛋白质抑制另一种蛋白质的转录），或者有意或功能因素之间的相互作用（例如，医院病人祈祷减轻疼痛）。提取和表示这些不同的因果关系对于从科学发现到社会科学等领域运行的认知系统至关重要。本文提出了一种基于 Transformer 的 NLP 架构，该架构联合提取知识图，包括（1）用语言描述的变量或因素，（2）这些变量的定性因果关系，（3）限制这些因果关系的限定词和量级，以及（4）用于在大型本体中定位每个提取节点的词义。我们并不声称我们的基于变压器的架构本身就是一个认知系统；然而，我们提供了其在现实世界领域中准确的知识图提取的证据，以及其生成的知识图对于执行基于图的推理的认知系统的实用性。我们展示了这种方法，并在两个用例中提供了有希望的结果，处理来自学术出版物、新闻文章和社交媒体的文本输入。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的自然语言处理架构，用于从非结构化文本中联合提取包含变量、因果关系、限定条件和词义的知识图谱。
AI.motivation: 定性因果关系在科学发现、社会科学等领域至关重要，但现有方法难以准确提取和表示文本中复杂的因果关系及约束条件。
AI.method: 设计基于Transformer的模型，同时提取四个要素：语言描述的变量、变量间的因果关系、约束因果关系的限定条件与量级，以及定位节点的词义信息。
AI.result: 在学术论文、新闻和社会媒体文本的两个应用案例中，验证了模型在真实领域知识图谱提取的准确性及生成图谱对基于图推理的认知系统的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为从多源文本中构建结构化因果知识图谱提供了可行方案，可有效支持需要图推理的认知系统应用。

title: When do GANs replicate? On the choice of dataset size
title_zh: GAN 什么时候进行复制？关于数据集大小的选择
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision 2021 (pp. 6701-6710)
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision 2021 (pp. 6701-6710)
abstract: Do GANs replicate training images? Previous studies have shown that GANs do not seem to replicate training data without significant change in the training procedure. This leads to a series of research on the exact condition needed for GANs to overfit to the training data. Although a number of factors has been theoretically or empirically identified, the effect of dataset size and complexity on GANs replication is still unknown. With empirical evidence from BigGAN and StyleGAN2, on datasets CelebA, Flower and LSUN-bedroom, we show that dataset size and its complexity play an important role in GANs replication and perceptual quality of the generated images. We further quantify this relationship, discovering that replication percentage decays exponentially with respect to dataset size and complexity, with a shared decaying factor across GAN-dataset combinations. Meanwhile, the perceptual image quality follows a U-shape trend w.r.t dataset size. This finding leads to a practical tool for one-shot estimation on minimal dataset size to prevent GAN replication which can be used to guide datasets construction and selection.
summary: Do GANs replicate training images? Previous studies have shown that GANs do not seem to replicate training data without significant change in the training procedure. This leads to a series of research on the exact condition needed for GANs to overfit to the training data. Although a number of factors has been theoretically or empirically identified, the effect of dataset size and complexity on GANs replication is still unknown. With empirical evidence from BigGAN and StyleGAN2, on datasets CelebA, Flower and LSUN-bedroom, we show that dataset size and its complexity play an important role in GANs replication and perceptual quality of the generated images. We further quantify this relationship, discovering that replication percentage decays exponentially with respect to dataset size and complexity, with a shared decaying factor across GAN-dataset combinations. Meanwhile, the perceptual image quality follows a U-shape trend w.r.t dataset size. This finding leads to a practical tool for one-shot estimation on minimal dataset size to prevent GAN replication which can be used to guide datasets construction and selection.
abstract_zh: GAN 会复制训练图像吗？之前的研究表明，如果不对训练过程进行重大改变，GAN 似乎不会复制训练数据。这引发了一系列关于 GAN 过度拟合训练数据所需的确切条件的研究。尽管从理论上或经验上已经确定了许多因素，但数据集大小和复杂性对 GAN 复制的影响仍然未知。借助来自 BigGAN 和 StyleGAN2 的经验证据，在数据集 CelebA、Flower 和 LSUN-bedroom 上，我们表明数据集大小及其复杂性在 GAN 复制和生成图像的感知质量中发挥着重要作用。我们进一步量化了这种关系，发现复制百分比随着数据集大小和复杂性呈指数衰减，并且跨 GAN 数据集组合具有共享的衰减因子。同时，感知图像质量随数据集大小呈 U 形趋势。这一发现催生了一种实用工具，可以对最小数据集大小进行一次性估计，以防止 GAN 复制，并可用于指导数据集构建和选择。

AI.tldr: 本文研究生成对抗网络（GANs）在不同数据集规模和复杂度下是否会复制训练图像，并探讨其生成图像的感知质量。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究指出GANs需调整训练过程才会复制训练数据，但数据集规模和复杂度对复制行为的影响尚未明确，亟需量化分析。
AI.method: 基于BigGAN和StyleGAN2模型，在CelebA、Flower和LSUN-bedroom数据集上进行实验，通过量化分析数据集规模与复杂度对复制率和生成图像质量的影响。
AI.result: 复制率随数据集规模和复杂度呈指数衰减，且生成图像感知质量呈现U型趋势；提出了一种单次估计最小数据集规模的实用工具。
AI.conclusion: 数据集规模和复杂度显著影响GANs复制行为，研究成果可指导数据集构建与选择以避免过度拟合。

title: Single Image Super-Resolution Methods: A Survey
title_zh: 单图像超分辨率方法：调查
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures
abstract: Super-resolution (SR), the process of obtaining high-resolution images from one or more low-resolution observations of the same scene, has been a very popular topic of research in the last few decades in both signal processing and image processing areas. Due to the recent developments in Convolutional Neural Networks, the popularity of SR algorithms has skyrocketed as the barrier of entry has been lowered significantly. Recently, this popularity has spread into video processing areas to the lengths of developing SR models that work in real-time. In this paper, we compare different SR models that specialize in single image processing and will take a glance at how they evolved to take on many different objectives and shapes over the years.
summary: Super-resolution (SR), the process of obtaining high-resolution images from one or more low-resolution observations of the same scene, has been a very popular topic of research in the last few decades in both signal processing and image processing areas. Due to the recent developments in Convolutional Neural Networks, the popularity of SR algorithms has skyrocketed as the barrier of entry has been lowered significantly. Recently, this popularity has spread into video processing areas to the lengths of developing SR models that work in real-time. In this paper, we compare different SR models that specialize in single image processing and will take a glance at how they evolved to take on many different objectives and shapes over the years.
abstract_zh: 超分辨率（SR）是从同一场景的一个或多个低分辨率观察中获得高分辨率图像的过程，是过去几十年信号处理和图像处理领域非常热门的研究主题。由于卷积神经网络的最新发展，SR 算法的受欢迎程度急剧上升，因为进入门槛已大大降低。最近，这种流行已经蔓延到视频处理领域，直至开发实时工作的 SR 模型。在本文中，我们比较了专门从事单图像处理的不同 SR 模型，并了解它们多年来如何演变以承担许多不同的目标和形状。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了单图像超分辨率（SR）方法的发展与比较，分析了不同模型在处理低分辨率图像以生成高分辨率图像方面的演变过程。
AI.motivation: 超分辨率技术因卷积神经网络的发展而迅速普及，并扩展到视频处理领域，需系统梳理其研究进展与技术差异。
AI.method: 通过比较不同单图像SR模型，回顾其在多年间针对多样化目标和应用场景的演变过程。
AI.result: 总结了各类SR方法的优缺点，以及它们如何适应不同任务需求并形成多样化技术路线。
AI.conclusion: 未来研究需进一步优化实时处理效率与图像质量，并探索更广泛的应用场景。

search_text: Single Image Super-Resolution Methods: A Survey 单图像超分辨率方法：调查 Super-resolution (SR), the process of obtaining high-resolution images from one or more low-resolution observations of the same scene, has been a very popular topic of research in the last few decades in both signal processing and image processing areas. Due to the recent developments in Convolutional Neural Networks, the popularity of SR algorithms has skyrocketed as the barrier of entry has been lowered significantly. Recently, this popularity has spread into video processing areas to the lengths of developing SR models that work in real-time. In this paper, we compare different SR models that specialize in single image processing and will take a glance at how they evolved to take on many different objectives and shapes over the years. 超分辨率（SR）是从同一场景的一个或多个低分辨率观察中获得高分辨率图像的过程，是过去几十年信号处理和图像处理领域非常热门的研究主题。由于卷积神经网络的最新发展，SR 算法的受欢迎程度急剧上升，因为进入门槛已大大降低。最近，这种流行已经蔓延到视频处理领域，直至开发实时工作的 SR 模型。在本文中，我们比较了专门从事单图像处理的不同 SR 模型，并了解它们多年来如何演变以承担许多不同的目标和形状。 本文综述了单图像超分辨率（SR）方法的发展与比较，分析了不同模型在处理低分辨率图像以生成高分辨率图像方面的演变过程。 Bahattin Can Maral eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Safe Control with Learned Certificates: A Survey of Neural Lyapunov, Barrier, and Contraction methods
title_zh: 通过学习证书进行安全控制：神经李雅普诺夫、屏障和收缩方法的调查
comment: Accepted at IEEE Transactions on Robotics. Supplementary code available at https://github.com/MIT-REALM/neural_clbf
comments: Accepted at IEEE Transactions on Robotics. Supplementary code available at https://github.com/MIT-REALM/neural_clbf
abstract: Learning-enabled control systems have demonstrated impressive empirical performance on challenging control problems in robotics, but this performance comes at the cost of reduced transparency and lack of guarantees on the safety or stability of the learned controllers. In recent years, new techniques have emerged to provide these guarantees by learning certificates alongside control policies -- these certificates provide concise, data-driven proofs that guarantee the safety and stability of the learned control system. These methods not only allow the user to verify the safety of a learned controller but also provide supervision during training, allowing safety and stability requirements to influence the training process itself. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive survey of this rapidly developing field of certificate learning. We hope that this paper will serve as an accessible introduction to the theory and practice of certificate learning, both to those who wish to apply these tools to practical robotics problems and to those who wish to dive more deeply into the theory of learning for control.
summary: Learning-enabled control systems have demonstrated impressive empirical performance on challenging control problems in robotics, but this performance comes at the cost of reduced transparency and lack of guarantees on the safety or stability of the learned controllers. In recent years, new techniques have emerged to provide these guarantees by learning certificates alongside control policies -- these certificates provide concise, data-driven proofs that guarantee the safety and stability of the learned control system. These methods not only allow the user to verify the safety of a learned controller but also provide supervision during training, allowing safety and stability requirements to influence the training process itself. In this paper, we provide a comprehensive survey of this rapidly developing field of certificate learning. We hope that this paper will serve as an accessible introduction to the theory and practice of certificate learning, both to those who wish to apply these tools to practical robotics problems and to those who wish to dive more deeply into the theory of learning for control.
abstract_zh: 支持学习的控制系统在机器人技术中具有挑战性的控制问题上表现出了令人印象深刻的经验性能，但这种性能是以降低透明度和缺乏对学习控制器的安全性或稳定性的保证为代价的。近年来，出现了新技术，通过学习证书和控制策略来提供这些保证——这些证书提供了简洁的、数据驱动的证明，保证了学习控制系统的安全性和稳定性。这些方法不仅允许用户验证学习控制器的安全性，而且还可以在训练期间提供监督，从而允许安全性和稳定性要求影响训练过程本身。在本文中，我们对这个快速发展的证书学习领域进行了全面的调查。我们希望本文能够为那些希望将这些工具应用于实际机器人问题的人以及那些希望更深入地研究控制学习理论的人提供对证书学习的理论和实践的简单介绍。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了通过学习证书（如神经Lyapunov、屏障和收缩方法）实现安全控制的最新技术，旨在提升学习型控制器的安全性与稳定性保证。
AI.motivation: 传统学习型控制系统的优异性能常伴随安全性与稳定性缺乏理论保证的问题，而新兴的证书学习方法可提供数据驱动的安全证明并指导训练过程。
AI.method: 系统梳理并分类神经Lyapunov函数、屏障证书及收缩方法等技术，分析其理论框架、实现方式及在机器人控制中的应用案例。
AI.result: 总结了当前证书学习方法的进展，明确了各类方法的适用场景、优势与局限性，并为后续研究提供了理论与实践方向。
AI.conclusion: 证书学习为安全关键的控制任务提供了可验证的解决方案，未来需进一步探索其泛化性、计算效率及与深度学习的深度融合。

title: ML-based Anomaly Detection in Optical Fiber Monitoring
title_zh: 光纤监控中基于机器学习的异常检测
comment: The AAAI-22 Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Cyber Security (AICS)
comments: The AAAI-22 Workshop on Artificial Intelligence for Cyber Security (AICS)
abstract: Secure and reliable data communication in optical networks is critical for high-speed internet. We propose a data driven approach for the anomaly detection and faults identification in optical networks to diagnose physical attacks such as fiber breaks and optical tapping. The proposed methods include an autoencoder-based anomaly detection and an attention-based bidirectional gated recurrent unit algorithm for the fiber fault identification and localization. We verify the efficiency of our methods by experiments under various attack scenarios using real operational data.
summary: Secure and reliable data communication in optical networks is critical for high-speed internet. We propose a data driven approach for the anomaly detection and faults identification in optical networks to diagnose physical attacks such as fiber breaks and optical tapping. The proposed methods include an autoencoder-based anomaly detection and an attention-based bidirectional gated recurrent unit algorithm for the fiber fault identification and localization. We verify the efficiency of our methods by experiments under various attack scenarios using real operational data.
abstract_zh: 光网络中安全可靠的数据通信对于高速互联网至关重要。我们提出了一种数据驱动的方法，用于光网络中的异常检测和故障识别，以诊断光纤断裂和光窃听等物理攻击。所提出的方法包括基于自动编码器的异常检测和基于注意力的双向门控循环单元算法，用于光纤故障识别和定位。我们通过使用真实操作数据在各种攻击场景下进行实验来验证我们方法的效率。

AI.tldr: 提出基于机器学习的异常检测方法，用于光纤网络中的物理攻击识别与故障定位。
AI.motivation: 确保光网络数据通信的安全与可靠，需有效检测物理攻击（如光纤断裂、光窃听）以保障高速互联网运行。
AI.method: 采用自编码器进行异常检测，结合注意力机制的双向门控循环单元（BiGRU）算法实现故障识别与定位。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在多种攻击场景下均能有效检测异常并准确定位光纤故障。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效提升了光纤网络中物理攻击的检测与故障定位能力，为光网络安全提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Shizhe Chen,Pierre-Louis Guhur,Makarand Tapaswi,Cordelia Schmid,Ivan Laptev
title: Think Global, Act Local: Dual-scale Graph Transformer for Vision-and-Language Navigation
title_zh: 放眼全球，行动本地：用于视觉和语言导航的双尺度图形转换器
abstract: Following language instructions to navigate in unseen environments is a challenging problem for autonomous embodied agents. The agent not only needs to ground languages in visual scenes, but also should explore the environment to reach its target. In this work, we propose a dual-scale graph transformer (DUET) for joint long-term action planning and fine-grained cross-modal understanding. We build a topological map on-the-fly to enable efficient exploration in global action space. To balance the complexity of large action space reasoning and fine-grained language grounding, we dynamically combine a fine-scale encoding over local observations and a coarse-scale encoding on a global map via graph transformers. The proposed approach, DUET, significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on goal-oriented vision-and-language navigation (VLN) benchmarks REVERIE and SOON. It also improves the success rate on the fine-grained VLN benchmark R2R.
summary: Following language instructions to navigate in unseen environments is a challenging problem for autonomous embodied agents. The agent not only needs to ground languages in visual scenes, but also should explore the environment to reach its target. In this work, we propose a dual-scale graph transformer (DUET) for joint long-term action planning and fine-grained cross-modal understanding. We build a topological map on-the-fly to enable efficient exploration in global action space. To balance the complexity of large action space reasoning and fine-grained language grounding, we dynamically combine a fine-scale encoding over local observations and a coarse-scale encoding on a global map via graph transformers. The proposed approach, DUET, significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on goal-oriented vision-and-language navigation (VLN) benchmarks REVERIE and SOON. It also improves the success rate on the fine-grained VLN benchmark R2R.
abstract_zh: 对于自主实体来说，遵循语言指令在看不见的环境中导航是一个具有挑战性的问题。智能体不仅需要在视觉场景中掌握语言，还应该探索环境以达到目标。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种双尺度图变换器（DUET），用于联合长期行动规划和细粒度的跨模式理解。我们即时构建拓扑图，以实现全球行动空间的有效探索。为了平衡大动作空间推理和细粒度语言基础的复杂性，我们通过图转换器动态地将局部观察的细尺度编码和全局地图上的粗尺度编码结合起来。所提出的方法 DUET 在面向目标的视觉和语言导航（VLN）基准 REVERIE 和 SOON 上显着优于最先进的方法。它还提高了细粒度 VLN 基准 R2R 的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种双尺度图变压器（DUET），用于解决视觉与语言导航（VLN）任务，通过结合局部观察和全局地图实现高效的环境探索与语言指令理解。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理视觉语言导航任务时，难以平衡大规模动作空间的推理复杂性与细粒度语言 grounding 的需求，导致探索效率与任务成功率受限。
AI.method: 构建动态拓扑地图以支持全局动作空间探索，通过图变压器动态融合局部细粒度观测编码与全局粗粒度地图编码，实现长时动作规划与跨模态理解的联合优化。

search_text: Think Global, Act Local: Dual-scale Graph Transformer for Vision-and-Language Navigation 放眼全球，行动本地：用于视觉和语言导航的双尺度图形转换器 Following language instructions to navigate in unseen environments is a challenging problem for autonomous embodied agents. The agent not only needs to ground languages in visual scenes, but also should explore the environment to reach its target. In this work, we propose a dual-scale graph transformer (DUET) for joint long-term action planning and fine-grained cross-modal understanding. We build a topological map on-the-fly to enable efficient exploration in global action space. To balance the complexity of large action space reasoning and fine-grained language grounding, we dynamically combine a fine-scale encoding over local observations and a coarse-scale encoding on a global map via graph transformers. The proposed approach, DUET, significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods on goal-oriented vision-and-language navigation (VLN) benchmarks REVERIE and SOON. It also improves the success rate on the fine-grained VLN benchmark R2R. 对于自主实体来说，遵循语言指令在看不见的环境中导航是一个具有挑战性的问题。智能体不仅需要在视觉场景中掌握语言，还应该探索环境以达到目标。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种双尺度图变换器（DUET），用于联合长期行动规划和细粒度的跨模式理解。我们即时构建拓扑图，以实现全球行动空间的有效探索。为了平衡大动作空间推理和细粒度语言基础的复杂性，我们通过图转换器动态地将局部观察的细尺度编码和全局地图上的粗尺度编码结合起来。所提出的方法 DUET 在面向目标的视觉和语言导航（VLN）基准 REVERIE 和 SOON 上显着优于最先进的方法。它还提高了细粒度 VLN 基准 R2R 的成功率。 本文提出了一种双尺度图变压器（DUET），用于解决视觉与语言导航（VLN）任务，通过结合局部观察和全局地图实现高效的环境探索与语言指令理解。 Shizhe Chen,Pierre-Louis Guhur,Makarand Tapaswi,Cordelia Schmid,Ivan Laptev cs.CV

title: COLD Decoding: Energy-based Constrained Text Generation with Langevin Dynamics
title_zh: 冷解码：使用 Langevin Dynamics 生成基于能量的约束文本
comment: NeurIPS 2022. code: https://github.com/qkaren/COLD_decoding
comments: NeurIPS 2022. code: https://github.com/qkaren/COLD_decoding
abstract: Many applications of text generation require incorporating different constraints to control the semantics or style of generated text. These constraints can be hard (e.g., ensuring certain keywords are included in the output) and soft (e.g., contextualizing the output with the left- or right-hand context). In this paper, we present Energy-based Constrained Decoding with Langevin Dynamics (COLD), a decoding framework which unifies constrained generation as specifying constraints through an energy function, then performing efficient differentiable reasoning over the constraints through gradient-based sampling. COLD decoding is a flexible framework that can be applied directly to off-the-shelf left-to-right language models without the need for any task-specific fine-tuning, as demonstrated through three challenging text generation applications: lexically-constrained generation, abductive reasoning, and counterfactual reasoning. Our experiments on these constrained generation tasks point to the effectiveness of our approach, both in terms of automatic and human evaluation.
summary: Many applications of text generation require incorporating different constraints to control the semantics or style of generated text. These constraints can be hard (e.g., ensuring certain keywords are included in the output) and soft (e.g., contextualizing the output with the left- or right-hand context). In this paper, we present Energy-based Constrained Decoding with Langevin Dynamics (COLD), a decoding framework which unifies constrained generation as specifying constraints through an energy function, then performing efficient differentiable reasoning over the constraints through gradient-based sampling. COLD decoding is a flexible framework that can be applied directly to off-the-shelf left-to-right language models without the need for any task-specific fine-tuning, as demonstrated through three challenging text generation applications: lexically-constrained generation, abductive reasoning, and counterfactual reasoning. Our experiments on these constrained generation tasks point to the effectiveness of our approach, both in terms of automatic and human evaluation.
abstract_zh: 文本生成的许多应用需要合并不同的约束来控制生成文本的语义或风格。这些约束可以是硬性的（例如，确保输出中包含某些关键字），也可以是软性的（例如，使用左侧或右侧上下文将输出置于上下文中）。在本文中，我们提出了 Langevin Dynamics 的基于能量的约束解码（COLD），这是一种解码框架，它将约束生成统一为通过能量函数指定约束，然后通过基于梯度的采样对约束执行有效的可微分推理。 COLD 解码是一个灵活的框架，可以直接应用于现成的从左到右的语言模型，而不需要任何特定于任务的微调，正如三个具有挑战性的文本生成应用程序所证明的那样：词汇约束生成、溯因推理和反事实推理。我们对这些受限生成任务的实验表明了我们的方法在自动评估和人工评估方面的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于能量函数的约束文本生成框架COLD，通过朗之万动力学实现高效梯度采样，解决文本生成中的硬约束和软约束问题。
AI.motivation: 现有文本生成方法在处理语义或风格约束时，难以同时满足硬约束（如关键词强制包含）和软约束（如上下文关联），且需依赖任务特定微调。
AI.method: 设计能量函数表征约束条件，利用朗之万动力学进行梯度下降采样，在预训练语言模型上直接应用无需微调，统一处理多种约束类型。
AI.result: 在词约束生成、归因推理和反事实推理三个任务中，COLD在自动评估和人工评估指标上均优于基线方法，展现优异约束满足能力。
AI.conclusion: COLD框架通过能量函数与梯度采样结合，实现了灵活高效的约束生成，为无需微调的通用文本生成提供了新思路。

title: Paying U-Attention to Textures: Multi-Stage Hourglass Vision Transformer for Universal Texture Synthesis
title_zh: 关注纹理：用于通用纹理合成的多级沙漏视觉转换器
abstract: We present a novel U-Attention vision Transformer for universal texture synthesis. We exploit the natural long-range dependencies enabled by the attention mechanism to allow our approach to synthesize diverse textures while preserving their structures in a single inference. We propose a hierarchical hourglass backbone that attends to the global structure and performs patch mapping at varying scales in a coarse-to-fine-to-coarse stream. Completed by skip connection and convolution designs that propagate and fuse information at different scales, our hierarchical U-Attention architecture unifies attention to features from macro structures to micro details, and progressively refines synthesis results at successive stages. Our method achieves stronger 2$\times$ synthesis than previous work on both stochastic and structured textures while generalizing to unseen textures without fine-tuning. Ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of each component of our architecture.
summary: We present a novel U-Attention vision Transformer for universal texture synthesis. We exploit the natural long-range dependencies enabled by the attention mechanism to allow our approach to synthesize diverse textures while preserving their structures in a single inference. We propose a hierarchical hourglass backbone that attends to the global structure and performs patch mapping at varying scales in a coarse-to-fine-to-coarse stream. Completed by skip connection and convolution designs that propagate and fuse information at different scales, our hierarchical U-Attention architecture unifies attention to features from macro structures to micro details, and progressively refines synthesis results at successive stages. Our method achieves stronger 2$\times$ synthesis than previous work on both stochastic and structured textures while generalizing to unseen textures without fine-tuning. Ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of each component of our architecture.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的 U-Attention 视觉 Transformer，用于通用纹理合成。我们利用注意力机制实现的自然远程依赖性，使我们的方法能够合成不同的纹理，同时在单个推理中保留它们的结构。我们提出了一个分层沙漏主干，它关注全局结构，并在从粗到细到粗的流中以不同的比例执行补丁映射。我们的分层 U-Attention 架构通过在不同尺度上传播和融合信息的跳跃连接和卷积设计来完成，统一了对从宏观结构到微观细节的特征的关注，并在连续阶段逐步细化合成结果。我们的方法在随机和结构化纹理上实现了比之前的工作更强的 2 倍综合，同时无需微调即可推广到不可见的纹理。消融研究证明了我们架构中每个组件的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于U-Attention机制的多阶段沙漏结构视觉Transformer，用于实现通用纹理合成，能够在单次推理中保持纹理结构并生成多样化结果。
AI.motivation: 现有纹理合成方法难以在保持结构完整性的同时生成多样化纹理，且难以处理不同尺度细节，需设计更高效的注意力机制与多尺度特征融合方案。
AI.method: 设计分层沙漏主干网络，结合U-Attention机制实现全局结构与局部细节的多尺度特征映射，通过跳跃连接与卷积设计融合不同尺度信息，采用粗到细再到粗的渐进式合成流程。
AI.result: 在随机纹理与结构化纹理数据集上均实现2倍分辨率合成，优于现有方法且无需微调即可泛化至新纹理，消融实验证明各模块有效性。
AI.conclusion: U-Attention架构通过多阶段特征融合与注意力机制，有效平衡了纹理多样性与结构保持性，为通用纹理合成提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

method: 设计分层沙漏主干网络，结合U-Attention机制实现全局结构与局部细节的多尺度特征映射，通过跳跃连接与卷积设计融合不同尺度信息，采用粗到细再到粗的渐进式合成流程。
result: 在随机纹理与结构化纹理数据集上均实现2倍分辨率合成，优于现有方法且无需微调即可泛化至新纹理，消融实验证明各模块有效性。
conclusion: U-Attention架构通过多阶段特征融合与注意力机制，有效平衡了纹理多样性与结构保持性，为通用纹理合成提供了高效且通用的解决方案。
search_text: Paying U-Attention to Textures: Multi-Stage Hourglass Vision Transformer for Universal Texture Synthesis 关注纹理：用于通用纹理合成的多级沙漏视觉转换器 We present a novel U-Attention vision Transformer for universal texture synthesis. We exploit the natural long-range dependencies enabled by the attention mechanism to allow our approach to synthesize diverse textures while preserving their structures in a single inference. We propose a hierarchical hourglass backbone that attends to the global structure and performs patch mapping at varying scales in a coarse-to-fine-to-coarse stream. Completed by skip connection and convolution designs that propagate and fuse information at different scales, our hierarchical U-Attention architecture unifies attention to features from macro structures to micro details, and progressively refines synthesis results at successive stages. Our method achieves stronger 2$\times$ synthesis than previous work on both stochastic and structured textures while generalizing to unseen textures without fine-tuning. Ablation studies demonstrate the effectiveness of each component of our architecture. 我们提出了一种新颖的 U-Attention 视觉 Transformer，用于通用纹理合成。我们利用注意力机制实现的自然远程依赖性，使我们的方法能够合成不同的纹理，同时在单个推理中保留它们的结构。我们提出了一个分层沙漏主干，它关注全局结构，并在从粗到细到粗的流中以不同的比例执行补丁映射。我们的分层 U-Attention 架构通过在不同尺度上传播和融合信息的跳跃连接和卷积设计来完成，统一了对从宏观结构到微观细节的特征的关注，并在连续阶段逐步细化合成结果。我们的方法在随机和结构化纹理上实现了比之前的工作更强的 2 倍综合，同时无需微调即可推广到不可见的纹理。消融研究证明了我们架构中每个组件的有效性。 本文提出一种基于U-Attention机制的多阶段沙漏结构视觉Transformer，用于实现通用纹理合成，能够在单次推理中保持纹理结构并生成多样化结果。 Shouchang Guo,Valentin Deschaintre,Douglas Noll,Arthur Roullier cs.CV,cs.GR,eess.IV

title: Exploiting Side Information for Improved Online Learning Algorithms in Wireless Networks
title_zh: 利用辅助信息改进无线网络中的在线学习算法
abstract: In wireless networks, the rate achieved depends on factors like level of interference, hardware impairments, and channel gain. Often, instantaneous values of some of these factors can be measured, and they provide useful information about the instantaneous rate achieved. For example, higher interference implies a lower rate. In this work, we treat any such measurable quality that has a non-zero correlation with the rate achieved as side-information and study how it can be exploited to quickly learn the channel that offers higher throughput (reward). When the mean value of the side-information is known, using control variate theory we develop algorithms that require fewer samples to learn the parameters and can improve the learning rate compared to cases where side-information is ignored. Specifically, we incorporate side-information in the classical Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) algorithm and quantify the gain achieved in the regret performance. We show that the gain is proportional to the amount of the correlation between the reward and associated side-information. We discuss in detail various side-information that can be exploited in cognitive radio and air-to-ground communication in $L-$band. We demonstrate that correlation between the reward and side-information is often strong in practice and exploiting it improves the throughput significantly.
summary: In wireless networks, the rate achieved depends on factors like level of interference, hardware impairments, and channel gain. Often, instantaneous values of some of these factors can be measured, and they provide useful information about the instantaneous rate achieved. For example, higher interference implies a lower rate. In this work, we treat any such measurable quality that has a non-zero correlation with the rate achieved as side-information and study how it can be exploited to quickly learn the channel that offers higher throughput (reward). When the mean value of the side-information is known, using control variate theory we develop algorithms that require fewer samples to learn the parameters and can improve the learning rate compared to cases where side-information is ignored. Specifically, we incorporate side-information in the classical Upper Confidence Bound (UCB) algorithm and quantify the gain achieved in the regret performance. We show that the gain is proportional to the amount of the correlation between the reward and associated side-information. We discuss in detail various side-information that can be exploited in cognitive radio and air-to-ground communication in $L-$band. We demonstrate that correlation between the reward and side-information is often strong in practice and exploiting it improves the throughput significantly.
abstract_zh: 在无线网络中，所达到的速率取决于干扰水平、硬件损伤和信道增益等因素。通常，可以测量其中一些因素的瞬时值，并且它们提供有关所实现的瞬时速率的有用信息。例如，较高的干扰意味着较低的速率。在这项工作中，我们将任何与所实现的速率具有非零相关性的可测量质量视为辅助信息，并研究如何利用它来快速学习提供更高吞吐量（奖励）的通道。当辅助信息的平均值已知时，使用控制变量理论，我们开发的算法需要更少的样本来学习参数，并且与忽略辅助信息的情况相比可以提高学习率。具体来说，我们将辅助信息纳入经典的置信上限（UCB）算法中，并量化遗憾性能中获得的增益。我们表明，增益与奖励和相关辅助信息之间的相关性成正比。我们详细讨论了可在 $L-$ 频段认知无线电和空对地通信中利用的各种辅助信息。我们证明，奖励和辅助信息之间的相关性在实践中通常很强，利用它可以显着提高吞吐量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用无线网络中的侧信息改进在线学习算法，以提高吞吐量。
AI.motivation: 无线网络的速率受多种因素影响，部分可测量因素与速率存在相关性，利用这些侧信息可加速信道学习过程。
AI.method: 基于控制变量理论，将侧信息整合到经典UCB算法中，并通过理论分析与实验验证其效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，利用侧信息可减少样本需求、提升学习效率，且性能增益与侧信息和奖励的相关性成正比。
AI.conclusion: 侧信息能显著提升在线学习算法性能，尤其在认知无线电和L波段空对地通信中具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Daniel Taylor,Jonathan Shock,Deshendran Moodley,Jonathan Ipser,Matthias Treder
title: Brain Structural Saliency Over The Ages
title_zh: 历代大脑结构显着性
comment: Submission to ACAIN 2022 conference (Sept. 2022); 20 pages including acknowledgements, references, appendices; 14 figures
comments: Submission to ACAIN 2022 conference (Sept. 2022); 20 pages including acknowledgements, references, appendices; 14 figures
abstract: Brain Age (BA) estimation via Deep Learning has become a strong and reliable bio-marker for brain health, but the black-box nature of Neural Networks does not easily allow insight into the features of brain ageing.We trained a ResNet model as a BA regressor on T1 structural MRI volumes from a small cross-sectional cohort of 524 individuals. Using Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP) and DeepLIFT saliency mapping techniques, we analysed the trained model to determine the most relevant structures for brain ageing for the network, and compare these between the saliency mapping techniques. We show the change in attribution of relevance to different brain regions through the course of ageing. A tripartite pattern of relevance attribution to brain regions emerges. Some regions increase in relevance with age (e.g. the right Transverse Temporal Gyrus); some decrease in relevance with age (e.g. the right Fourth Ventricle); and others are consistently relevant across ages. We also examine the effect of the Brain Age Gap (BAG) on the distribution of relevance within the brain volume. It is hoped that these findings will provide clinically relevant region-wise trajectories for normal brain ageing, and a baseline against which to compare brain ageing trajectories.
summary: Brain Age (BA) estimation via Deep Learning has become a strong and reliable bio-marker for brain health, but the black-box nature of Neural Networks does not easily allow insight into the features of brain ageing.We trained a ResNet model as a BA regressor on T1 structural MRI volumes from a small cross-sectional cohort of 524 individuals. Using Layer-wise Relevance Propagation (LRP) and DeepLIFT saliency mapping techniques, we analysed the trained model to determine the most relevant structures for brain ageing for the network, and compare these between the saliency mapping techniques. We show the change in attribution of relevance to different brain regions through the course of ageing. A tripartite pattern of relevance attribution to brain regions emerges. Some regions increase in relevance with age (e.g. the right Transverse Temporal Gyrus); some decrease in relevance with age (e.g. the right Fourth Ventricle); and others are consistently relevant across ages. We also examine the effect of the Brain Age Gap (BAG) on the distribution of relevance within the brain volume. It is hoped that these findings will provide clinically relevant region-wise trajectories for normal brain ageing, and a baseline against which to compare brain ageing trajectories.
abstract_zh: 通过深度学习进行的脑年龄 (BA) 估计已成为大脑健康的强大而可靠的生物标志物，但神经网络的黑盒性质并不容易深入了解大脑老化的特征。我们根据来自 524 名个体的小型横截面队列的 T1 结构 MRI 数据训练了一个 ResNet 模型作为 BA 回归器。使用逐层相关性传播 (LRP) 和 DeepLIFT 显着性映射技术，我们分析了训练后的模型，以确定网络中与大脑老化最相关的结构，并在显着性映射技术之间进行比较。我们展示了随着衰老过程中不同大脑区域的相关性归因的变化。出现了大脑区域相关性归因的三方模式。一些区域的相关性随着年龄的增长而增加（例如右侧颞横回）；随着年龄的增长，相关性有所下降（例如右侧第四脑室）；以及其他一些在各个年龄段都始终相关的内容。我们还研究了脑年龄差距（BAG）对脑容量内相关性分布的影响。希望这些发现将为正常大脑衰老提供临床相关的区域轨迹，以及比较大脑衰老轨迹的基线。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过深度学习模型和显著性映射技术分析大脑结构随年龄变化的显著区域，揭示正常脑衰老的特征模式。
AI.motivation: 尽管脑龄（BA）估计已被证明是有效的生物标志物，但深度学习模型的黑箱特性限制了对脑衰老特征的可解释性，需明确不同脑区与衰老的关联性以提供临床参考。
AI.method: 基于ResNet构建脑龄回归模型，采用LRP和DeepLIFT显著性映射技术分析模型决策依据，比较不同方法对脑区相关性的识别差异，并分析脑龄差距（BAG）对显著性分布的影响。
AI.result: 发现三类脑区显著性变化模式：部分区域随年龄增长相关性增强（如右侧横颞回），部分区域相关性减弱（如右侧第四脑室），其余区域显著性稳定；脑龄差距显著影响脑体积内显著性分布。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为正常脑衰老提供了区域化轨迹图谱，可作为评估异常脑衰老的临床基准，同时揭示了深度学习模型在脑健康研究中的可解释性潜力。

Some regions increase in relevance with age (e.g. the right Transverse Temporal Gyrus); some decrease in relevance with age (e.g. the right Fourth Ventricle); and others are consistently relevant across ages. We also examine the effect of the Brain Age Gap (BAG) on the distribution of relevance within the brain volume. It is hoped that these findings will provide clinically relevant region-wise trajectories for normal brain ageing, and a baseline against which to compare brain ageing trajectories. 通过深度学习进行的脑年龄 (BA) 估计已成为大脑健康的强大而可靠的生物标志物，但神经网络的黑盒性质并不容易深入了解大脑老化的特征。我们根据来自 524 名个体的小型横截面队列的 T1 结构 MRI 数据训练了一个 ResNet 模型作为 BA 回归器。使用逐层相关性传播 (LRP) 和 DeepLIFT 显着性映射技术，我们分析了训练后的模型，以确定网络中与大脑老化最相关的结构，并在显着性映射技术之间进行比较。我们展示了随着衰老过程中不同大脑区域的相关性归因的变化。出现了大脑区域相关性归因的三方模式。一些区域的相关性随着年龄的增长而增加（例如右侧颞横回）；随着年龄的增长，相关性有所下降（例如右侧第四脑室）；以及其他一些在各个年龄段都始终相关的内容。我们还研究了脑年龄差距（BAG）对脑容量内相关性分布的影响。希望这些发现将为正常大脑衰老提供临床相关的区域轨迹，以及比较大脑衰老轨迹的基线。 该论文通过深度学习模型和显著性映射技术分析大脑结构随年龄变化的显著区域，揭示正常脑衰老的特征模式。 Daniel Taylor,Jonathan Shock,Deshendran Moodley,Jonathan Ipser,Matthias Treder q-bio.NC,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Jeewon Heo,Youngjoo Kim,Jos B. T. M. Roerdink
title: Human Motion Detection Using Sharpened Dimensionality Reduction and Clustering
title_zh: 使用锐化降维和聚类的人体运动检测
comment: This paper was accepted and presented at International Conference on Biomedical and Health Informatics (ICBHI2021) (https://conference21.kosombe.or.kr/register/2021_fall/main.html)
comments: This paper was accepted and presented at International Conference on Biomedical and Health Informatics (ICBHI2021) (https://conference21.kosombe.or.kr/register/2021_fall/main.html)
abstract: Sharpened dimensionality reduction (SDR), which belongs to the class of multidimensional projection techniques, has recently been introduced to tackle the challenges in the exploratory and visual analysis of high-dimensional data. SDR has been applied to various real-world datasets, such as human activity sensory data and astronomical datasets. However, manually labeling the samples from the generated projection are expensive. To address this problem, we propose here to use clustering methods such as k-means, Hierarchical Clustering, Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise (DBSCAN), and Spectral Clustering to easily label the 2D projections of high-dimensional data. We test our pipeline of SDR and the clustering methods on a range of synthetic and real-world datasets, including two different public human activity datasets extracted from smartphone accelerometer or gyroscope recordings of various movements. We apply clustering to assess the visual cluster separation of SDR, both qualitatively and quantitatively. We conclude that clustering SDR results yields better labeling results than clustering plain DR, and that k-means is the recommended clustering method for SDR in terms of clustering accuracy, ease-of-use, and computational scalability.
summary: Sharpened dimensionality reduction (SDR), which belongs to the class of multidimensional projection techniques, has recently been introduced to tackle the challenges in the exploratory and visual analysis of high-dimensional data. SDR has been applied to various real-world datasets, such as human activity sensory data and astronomical datasets. However, manually labeling the samples from the generated projection are expensive. To address this problem, we propose here to use clustering methods such as k-means, Hierarchical Clustering, Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise (DBSCAN), and Spectral Clustering to easily label the 2D projections of high-dimensional data. We test our pipeline of SDR and the clustering methods on a range of synthetic and real-world datasets, including two different public human activity datasets extracted from smartphone accelerometer or gyroscope recordings of various movements. We apply clustering to assess the visual cluster separation of SDR, both qualitatively and quantitatively. We conclude that clustering SDR results yields better labeling results than clustering plain DR, and that k-means is the recommended clustering method for SDR in terms of clustering accuracy, ease-of-use, and computational scalability.
abstract_zh: 最近引入了锐化降维（SDR），属于多维投影技术类别，以解决高维数据探索性和可视化分析中的挑战。 SDR已应用于各种现实世界数据集，例如人类活动感知数据和天文数据集。然而，手动标记生成的投影中的样本非常昂贵。为了解决这个问题，我们在这里建议使用 k-means、层次聚类、基于密度的噪声应用空间聚类 (DBSCAN) 和谱聚类等聚类方法来轻松标记高维数据的 2D 投影。我们在一系列合成和真实数据集上测试我们的 SDR 管道和聚类方法，包括从智能手机加速度计或陀螺仪记录的各种运动中提取的两个不同的公共人类活动数据集。我们应用聚类来定性和定量地评估 SDR 的视觉聚类分离。我们得出的结论是，聚类 SDR 结果比聚类普通 DR 产生更好的标记结果，并且就聚类准确性、易用性和计算可扩展性而言，k-means 是 SDR 推荐的聚类方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合增强降维（SDR）与聚类方法，自动标注高维人体运动数据的二维投影，以解决手动标注成本高的问题。
AI.motivation: SDR生成的高维数据投影需人工标注，成本高昂且效率低下，需自动化方法提升标注效率与准确性。
AI.method: 采用k-means、层次聚类、DBSCAN和谱聚类等算法，对SDR生成的二维投影进行聚类分析，并在合成数据及两个公开人体活动数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: 聚类SDR结果优于传统降维方法，其中k-means在聚类准确率、易用性及计算扩展性方面表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 推荐使用k-means对SDR结果进行聚类，以实现高效、准确的人体运动数据标注。

authors_text: Fabio Pino,Lorenzo Schena,Jean Rabault,Miguel A. Mendez
title: Comparative analysis of machine learning methods for active flow control
title_zh: 主动流量控制的机器学习方法对比分析
comment: submitted to Journal of Fluid Mechanics
comments: submitted to Journal of Fluid Mechanics
abstract: Machine learning frameworks such as Genetic Programming (GP) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) are gaining popularity in flow control. This work presents a comparative analysis of the two, bench-marking some of their most representative algorithms against global optimization techniques such as Bayesian Optimization (BO) and Lipschitz global optimization (LIPO). First, we review the general framework of the model-free control problem, bringing together all methods as black-box optimization problems. Then, we test the control algorithms on three test cases. These are (1) the stabilization of a nonlinear dynamical system featuring frequency cross-talk, (2) the wave cancellation from a Burgers' flow and (3) the drag reduction in a cylinder wake flow. We present a comprehensive comparison to illustrate their differences in exploration versus exploitation and their balance between `model capacity' in the control law definition versus `required complexity'. We believe that such a comparison paves the way toward the hybridization of the various methods, and we offer some perspective on their future development in the literature on flow control problems.
summary: Machine learning frameworks such as Genetic Programming (GP) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) are gaining popularity in flow control. This work presents a comparative analysis of the two, bench-marking some of their most representative algorithms against global optimization techniques such as Bayesian Optimization (BO) and Lipschitz global optimization (LIPO). First, we review the general framework of the model-free control problem, bringing together all methods as black-box optimization problems. Then, we test the control algorithms on three test cases. These are (1) the stabilization of a nonlinear dynamical system featuring frequency cross-talk, (2) the wave cancellation from a Burgers' flow and (3) the drag reduction in a cylinder wake flow. We present a comprehensive comparison to illustrate their differences in exploration versus exploitation and their balance between `model capacity' in the control law definition versus `required complexity'. We believe that such a comparison paves the way toward the hybridization of the various methods, and we offer some perspective on their future development in the literature on flow control problems.
abstract_zh: 遗传编程（GP）和强化学习（RL）等机器学习框架在流量控制中越来越受欢迎。这项工作对两者进行了比较分析，将它们的一些最具代表性的算法与贝叶斯优化 (BO) 和 Lipschitz 全局优化 (LIPO) 等全局优化技术进行了基准测试。首先，我们回顾无模型控制问题的一般框架，将所有方法汇集为黑盒优化问题。然后，我们在三个测试用例上测试控制算法。这些是（1）以频率串扰为特征的非线性动力系统的稳定性，（2）伯格斯流的波抵消以及（3）圆柱尾流中的阻力减少。我们进行了全面的比较，以说明它们在探索与利用方面的差异，以及它们在控制法定义中的“模型能力”与“所需复杂性”之间的平衡。我们相信这种比较为各种方法的混合铺平了道路，并且我们在流量控制问题的文献中提供了关于它们未来发展的一些观点。

AI.tldr: 比较不同机器学习方法在主动流动控制中的效果
AI.motivation: 机器学习方法在流动控制中应用广泛但缺乏系统比较，需明确不同方法的优劣以指导未来混合方法发展
AI.method: 将控制问题统一为黑盒优化框架，通过三个典型流动控制案例测试GP/RL/BO/LIPO算法，分析探索-利用平衡及模型复杂度差异
AI.result: 揭示了不同算法在探索效率、模型表达能力与计算复杂度间的权衡关系，量化了各方法在特定流动场景下的性能差异
AI.conclusion: 为多方法混合优化提供理论依据，建议未来研究应关注算法适应性增强与跨场景迁移能力的提升
