title: Anomaly Detection in 3D Point Clouds using Deep Geometric Descriptors
title_zh: 使用深度几何描述符进行 3D 点云异常检测
abstract: We present a new method for the unsupervised detection of geometric anomalies in high-resolution 3D point clouds. In particular, we propose an adaptation of the established student-teacher anomaly detection framework to three dimensions. A student network is trained to match the output of a pretrained teacher network on anomaly-free point clouds. When applied to test data, regression errors between the teacher and the student allow reliable localization of anomalous structures. To construct an expressive teacher network that extracts dense local geometric descriptors, we introduce a novel self-supervised pretraining strategy. The teacher is trained by reconstructing local receptive fields and does not require annotations. Extensive experiments on the comprehensive MVTec 3D Anomaly Detection dataset highlight the effectiveness of our approach, which outperforms the next-best method by a large margin. Ablation studies show that our approach meets the requirements of practical applications regarding performance, runtime, and memory consumption.
summary: We present a new method for the unsupervised detection of geometric anomalies in high-resolution 3D point clouds. In particular, we propose an adaptation of the established student-teacher anomaly detection framework to three dimensions. A student network is trained to match the output of a pretrained teacher network on anomaly-free point clouds. When applied to test data, regression errors between the teacher and the student allow reliable localization of anomalous structures. To construct an expressive teacher network that extracts dense local geometric descriptors, we introduce a novel self-supervised pretraining strategy. The teacher is trained by reconstructing local receptive fields and does not require annotations. Extensive experiments on the comprehensive MVTec 3D Anomaly Detection dataset highlight the effectiveness of our approach, which outperforms the next-best method by a large margin. Ablation studies show that our approach meets the requirements of practical applications regarding performance, runtime, and memory consumption.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法，用于无监督检测高分辨率 3D 点云中的几何异常。特别是，我们建议将已建立的学生-教师异常检测框架适应三个维度。训练学生网络以匹配无异常点云上预训练教师网络的输出。当应用于测试数据时，教师和学生之间的回归误差可以实现异常结构的可靠定位。为了构建一个提取密集局部几何描述符的富有表现力的教师网络，我们引入了一种新颖的自监督预训练策略。教师通过重建局部感受野进行训练，不需要注释。在综合 MVTec 3D 异常检测数据集上进行的大量实验突显了我们方法的有效性，该方法大幅优于次佳方法。消融研究表明，我们的方法满足实际应用在性能、运行时间和内存消耗方面的要求。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学生-教师框架的无监督3D点云异常检测方法，通过深度几何描述符实现高精度异常定位。
AI.motivation: 现有3D点云异常检测方法在高分辨率场景下表现不足，且依赖标注数据限制了实际应用，需开发无需标注的高效检测方案。
AI.method: 改编学生-教师框架：教师网络通过自监督重建局部几何特征，学生网络学习匹配教师输出；测试时通过回归误差定位异常结构。
AI.result: 在MVTec 3D数据集上显著优于现有方法，且满足实际应用对性能、运行效率和内存消耗的要求。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在无需标注情况下实现高精度3D异常检测，验证了深度几何描述符与自监督预训练的有效性。

search_text: Anomaly Detection in 3D Point Clouds using Deep Geometric Descriptors 使用深度几何描述符进行 3D 点云异常检测 We present a new method for the unsupervised detection of geometric anomalies in high-resolution 3D point clouds. In particular, we propose an adaptation of the established student-teacher anomaly detection framework to three dimensions. A student network is trained to match the output of a pretrained teacher network on anomaly-free point clouds. When applied to test data, regression errors between the teacher and the student allow reliable localization of anomalous structures. To construct an expressive teacher network that extracts dense local geometric descriptors, we introduce a novel self-supervised pretraining strategy. The teacher is trained by reconstructing local receptive fields and does not require annotations. Extensive experiments on the comprehensive MVTec 3D Anomaly Detection dataset highlight the effectiveness of our approach, which outperforms the next-best method by a large margin. Ablation studies show that our approach meets the requirements of practical applications regarding performance, runtime, and memory consumption. 我们提出了一种新方法，用于无监督检测高分辨率 3D 点云中的几何异常。特别是，我们建议将已建立的学生-教师异常检测框架适应三个维度。训练学生网络以匹配无异常点云上预训练教师网络的输出。当应用于测试数据时，教师和学生之间的回归误差可以实现异常结构的可靠定位。为了构建一个提取密集局部几何描述符的富有表现力的教师网络，我们引入了一种新颖的自监督预训练策略。教师通过重建局部感受野进行训练，不需要注释。在综合 MVTec 3D 异常检测数据集上进行的大量实验突显了我们方法的有效性，该方法大幅优于次佳方法。消融研究表明，我们的方法满足实际应用在性能、运行时间和内存消耗方面的要求。 本文提出一种基于学生-教师框架的无监督3D点云异常检测方法，通过深度几何描述符实现高精度异常定位。 Paul Bergmann,David Sattlegger cs.CV

authors_text: Jack Umenberger,Max Simchowitz,Juan C. Perdomo,Kaiqing Zhang,Russ Tedrake
title: Globally Convergent Policy Search over Dynamic Filters for Output Estimation
title_zh: 用于输出估计的动态过滤器的全局收敛策略搜索
abstract: We introduce the first direct policy search algorithm which provably converges to the globally optimal $\textit{dynamic}$ filter for the classical problem of predicting the outputs of a linear dynamical system, given noisy, partial observations. Despite the ubiquity of partial observability in practice, theoretical guarantees for direct policy search algorithms, one of the backbones of modern reinforcement learning, have proven difficult to achieve. This is primarily due to the degeneracies which arise when optimizing over filters that maintain internal state. In this paper, we provide a new perspective on this challenging problem based on the notion of $\textit{informativity}$, which intuitively requires that all components of a filter's internal state are representative of the true state of the underlying dynamical system. We show that informativity overcomes the aforementioned degeneracy. Specifically, we propose a $\textit{regularizer}$ which explicitly enforces informativity, and establish that gradient descent on this regularized objective - combined with a ``reconditioning step'' - converges to the globally optimal cost a $\mathcal{O}(1/T)$ rate. Our analysis relies on several new results which may be of independent interest, including a new framework for analyzing non-convex gradient descent via convex reformulation, and novel bounds on the solution to linear Lyapunov equations in terms of (our quantitative measure of) informativity.
summary: We introduce the first direct policy search algorithm which provably converges to the globally optimal $\textit{dynamic}$ filter for the classical problem of predicting the outputs of a linear dynamical system, given noisy, partial observations. Despite the ubiquity of partial observability in practice, theoretical guarantees for direct policy search algorithms, one of the backbones of modern reinforcement learning, have proven difficult to achieve. This is primarily due to the degeneracies which arise when optimizing over filters that maintain internal state. In this paper, we provide a new perspective on this challenging problem based on the notion of $\textit{informativity}$, which intuitively requires that all components of a filter's internal state are representative of the true state of the underlying dynamical system. We show that informativity overcomes the aforementioned degeneracy. Specifically, we propose a $\textit{regularizer}$ which explicitly enforces informativity, and establish that gradient descent on this regularized objective - combined with a ``reconditioning step'' - converges to the globally optimal cost a $\mathcal{O}(1/T)$ rate. Our analysis relies on several new results which may be of independent interest, including a new framework for analyzing non-convex gradient descent via convex reformulation, and novel bounds on the solution to linear Lyapunov equations in terms of (our quantitative measure of) informativity.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了第一个直接策略搜索算法，该算法可证明收敛于全局最优 $\textit{dynamic}$ 过滤器，用于在给定噪声、部分观测的情况下预测线性动力系统输出的经典问题。尽管部分可观察性在实践中普遍存在，但事实证明，直接策略搜索算法（现代强化学习的支柱之一）的理论保证很难实现。这主要是由于优化维护内部状态的过滤器时出现的简并性。在本文中，我们基于 $\textit{informativity}$ 的概念为这个具有挑战性的问题提供了一个新的视角，它直观地要求滤波器内部状态的所有组件都代表底层动态系统的真实状态。我们证明信息性克服了上述的退化。具体来说，我们提出了一个 $\textit{regularizer}$ ，它明确地强制执行信息性，并在这个正则化目标上建立梯度下降 - 结合“重新调整步骤” - 以 $\mathcal{O}(1/T)$ 速率收敛到全局最优成本。我们的分析依赖于几个可能具有独立意义的新结果，包括通过凸重构分析非凸梯度下降的新框架，以及在信息性（我们的定量测量）方面线性李亚普诺夫方程解的新界限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可证明全局收敛的直接策略搜索算法，用于在部分可观测的线性动态系统中估计输出。
AI.motivation: 尽管部分可观测性在实际中普遍存在，但直接策略搜索算法的理论保证难以实现，尤其在优化维护内部状态的滤波器时存在退化问题。
AI.method: 通过引入‘信息性’概念设计正则化项，结合梯度下降与重新条件化步骤，克服滤波器内部状态退化问题。
AI.result: 证明了该方法以O(1/T)速率收敛到全局最优解，并提供了非凸梯度下降分析框架及线性李雅普诺夫方程的新界。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为部分可观测动态系统提供了理论保证，并为非凸优化提供了独立感兴趣的分析工具。

title: A Complete Criterion for Value of Information in Soluble Influence Diagrams
title_zh: 可溶影响图中信息价值的完整标准
comment: In Proceedings of the AAAI 2022 Conference
comments: In Proceedings of the AAAI 2022 Conference
abstract: Influence diagrams have recently been used to analyse the safety and fairness properties of AI systems. A key building block for this analysis is a graphical criterion for value of information (VoI). This paper establishes the first complete graphical criterion for VoI in influence diagrams with multiple decisions. Along the way, we establish two important techniques for proving properties of multi-decision influence diagrams: ID homomorphisms are structure-preserving transformations of influence diagrams, while a Tree of Systems is collection of paths that captures how information and control can flow in an influence diagram.
summary: Influence diagrams have recently been used to analyse the safety and fairness properties of AI systems. A key building block for this analysis is a graphical criterion for value of information (VoI). This paper establishes the first complete graphical criterion for VoI in influence diagrams with multiple decisions. Along the way, we establish two important techniques for proving properties of multi-decision influence diagrams: ID homomorphisms are structure-preserving transformations of influence diagrams, while a Tree of Systems is collection of paths that captures how information and control can flow in an influence diagram.
abstract_zh: 影响图最近被用来分析人工智能系统的安全性和公平性。此分析的关键组成部分是信息价值 (VoI) 的图形标准。本文为多决策影响图中的 VoI 建立了第一个完整的图形标准。在此过程中，我们建立了两种重要的技术来证明多决策影响图的属性：ID同态是影响图的结构保留变换，而系统树是捕获信息和控制如何在影响图中流动的路径集合。

AI.tldr: 提出多决策可溶影响图中信息价值（VoI）的完整图示准则
AI.motivation: 现有方法缺乏对多决策影响图中信息价值的完整分析，需建立更全面的准则以支持AI系统安全与公平性验证
AI.method: 通过引入ID同态（结构保持变换）和系统树（捕捉信息与控制流路径的集合）两种技术，证明多决策影响图的性质
AI.result: 首次建立多决策影响图中信息价值的完整图示判定准则，填补了该领域的理论空白
AI.conclusion: 该准则为AI系统安全性和公平性分析提供了关键理论工具，推动影响图在AI伦理验证中的应用

title: ChimeraMix: Image Classification on Small Datasets via Masked Feature Mixing
title_zh: ChimeraMix：通过屏蔽特征混合对小数据集进行图像分类
comment: Published at IJCAI-22
comments: Published at IJCAI-22
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks require large amounts of labeled data samples. For many real-world applications, this is a major limitation which is commonly treated by augmentation methods. In this work, we address the problem of learning deep neural networks on small datasets. Our proposed architecture called ChimeraMix learns a data augmentation by generating compositions of instances. The generative model encodes images in pairs, combines the features guided by a mask, and creates new samples. For evaluation, all methods are trained from scratch without any additional data. Several experiments on benchmark datasets, e.g. ciFAIR-10, STL-10, and ciFAIR-100, demonstrate the superior performance of ChimeraMix compared to current state-of-the-art methods for classification on small datasets.
summary: Deep convolutional neural networks require large amounts of labeled data samples. For many real-world applications, this is a major limitation which is commonly treated by augmentation methods. In this work, we address the problem of learning deep neural networks on small datasets. Our proposed architecture called ChimeraMix learns a data augmentation by generating compositions of instances. The generative model encodes images in pairs, combines the features guided by a mask, and creates new samples. For evaluation, all methods are trained from scratch without any additional data. Several experiments on benchmark datasets, e.g. ciFAIR-10, STL-10, and ciFAIR-100, demonstrate the superior performance of ChimeraMix compared to current state-of-the-art methods for classification on small datasets.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络需要大量标记数据样本。对于许多现实世界的应用程序来说，这是一个主要的限制，通常通过增强方法来解决。在这项工作中，我们解决了在小数据集上学习深度神经网络的问题。我们提出的称为 ChimeraMix 的架构通过生成实例组合来学习数据增强。生成模型对图像进行成对编码，结合掩模引导的特征，并创建新样本。为了进行评估，所有方法都是从头开始训练的，没有任何额外的数据。在基准数据集上进行的一些实验，例如ciFAIR-10、STL-10 和 ciFAIR-100 证明了 ChimeraMix 与当前最先进的小型数据集分类方法相比具有卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ChimeraMix的新型数据增强方法，通过掩码特征混合技术提升小数据集上的图像分类性能。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型依赖大量标注数据，而实际应用中数据获取受限，传统数据增强方法难以有效应对小数据集的挑战。
AI.method: 设计ChimeraMix架构，通过编码图像对并利用掩码指导特征混合生成新样本，实现数据增强过程。
AI.result: 在ciFAIR-10、STL-10等基准数据集上，ChimeraMix相比现有方法取得更优分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: ChimeraMix为小数据集的图像分类提供了有效的数据增强策略，验证了特征混合方法在数据受限场景下的优势。

search_text: ChimeraMix: Image Classification on Small Datasets via Masked Feature Mixing ChimeraMix：通过屏蔽特征混合对小数据集进行图像分类 Deep convolutional neural networks require large amounts of labeled data samples. For many real-world applications, this is a major limitation which is commonly treated by augmentation methods. In this work, we address the problem of learning deep neural networks on small datasets. Our proposed architecture called ChimeraMix learns a data augmentation by generating compositions of instances. The generative model encodes images in pairs, combines the features guided by a mask, and creates new samples. For evaluation, all methods are trained from scratch without any additional data.
